---
title: "Master's Thesis Graphing and Statistics"
author: "Hunter Mackin"
date: "2022-10-24"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
# Loading libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(ncdf4)
library(raster)
library(reshape2)
library(tdr)
library(rtry)
library(traits)
library(writexl)
library(readxl)
library(ggpubr)
library(ggmap)
library(sp)
library(maps)
library(mapdata)
library(cowplot)
library(grid)
library(gridExtra)
```

```{r}
### New M.S. thesis runs - FF only
##### Setting working directory
setwd("/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis")

##### Reading in day and year dataframes
date <- read_csv("Date_daily.csv") # This includes every day from 1/1/1961 to 12/31/2021
date_spinup <- read_csv("Date_daily_spinup.csv") # This includes every day from 1/1/1650 to 12/31/1960
year <- read_csv("Year.csv") # This includes every year from 1961 to 2021
year_spinup <- read_csv("Year_spinup.csv") # This includes every year from 1650 to 1960

##### Reading in NetCDF data (simulation runs)
#### Frankbrook Farm runs
### Spinup
spinup_FF_biom_readin <- nc_open("FF-spinup-biomass.nc")
spinup_FF_cbiol <- ncvar_get(spinup_FF_biom_readin, "cbiol")
spinup_FF_cbios <- ncvar_get(spinup_FF_biom_readin, "cbios")
spinup_FF_cbiog <- ncvar_get(spinup_FF_biom_readin, "cbiog")
spinup_FF_cbior <- ncvar_get(spinup_FF_biom_readin, "cbior")
spinup_FF_biomass <- ncvar_get(spinup_FF_biom_readin, "biomass")
spinup_FF_plai_readin <- nc_open("FF-spinup-plai.nc")
spinup_FF_plai <- ncvar_get(spinup_FF_plai_readin, "plai")
spinup_FF_aet_d_readin <- nc_open("FF-spinup-aet-d.nc")
spinup_FF_aet_d <- ncvar_get(spinup_FF_aet_d_readin, "aet")
spinup_FF_wsoi_d_readin <- nc_open("FF-spinup-wsoi-d.nc")
spinup_FF_wsoi_d <- ncvar_get(spinup_FF_wsoi_d_readin, "wsoi")
# No PFT
spinup_FF_pasture_readin <- nc_open("FF-spinup-pasture.nc")
spinup_FF_agbiom <- ncvar_get(spinup_FF_pasture_readin, "agbiom")
spinup_FF_panpp <- ncvar_get(spinup_FF_pasture_readin, "panpp")
spinup_FF_pbnpp <- ncvar_get(spinup_FF_pasture_readin, "pbnpp")
spinup_FF_grazedbiom <- ncvar_get(spinup_FF_pasture_readin, "grazedbiom")
spinup_FF_l3agbiomfrac <- ncvar_get(spinup_FF_pasture_readin, "l3agbiomfrac")
# Annual
spinup_FF_npp_readin <- nc_open("FF-spinup-npp.nc")
spinup_FF_anpptot <- ncvar_get(spinup_FF_npp_readin, "anpptot")
spinup_FF_npptot <- ncvar_get(spinup_FF_npp_readin, "npptot")
spinup_FF_npp <- ncvar_get(spinup_FF_npp_readin, "npp")
spinup_FF_gsdays <- ncvar_get(spinup_FF_npp_readin, "gsdays")
spinup_FF_aet_y_readin <- nc_open("FF-spinup-aet-y.nc")
spinup_FF_aet_y <- ncvar_get(spinup_FF_aet_y_readin, "aet")
spinup_FF_wsoi_y_readin <- nc_open("FF-spinup-wsoi-y.nc")
spinup_FF_wsoi_y <- ncvar_get(spinup_FF_wsoi_y_readin, "wsoi")
spinup_FF_vegtype0_readin <- nc_open("FF-spinup-vegtype0.nc")
spinup_FF_vegtype0 <- ncvar_get(spinup_FF_vegtype0_readin, "vegtype0")
spinup_FF_csoi_readin <- nc_open("FF-spinup-csoi.nc")
spinup_FF_totcsoi <- ncvar_get(spinup_FF_csoi_readin, "totcsoi")


### C3 Only
## Ungrazed
# Daily
C3_ung_FF_biom_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-ung-biomass.nc")
C3_ung_FF_cbiol <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_FF_biom_readin, "cbiol")
C3_ung_FF_cbios <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_FF_biom_readin, "cbios")
C3_ung_FF_cbiog <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_FF_biom_readin, "cbiog")
C3_ung_FF_cbior <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_FF_biom_readin, "cbior")
C3_ung_FF_biomass <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_FF_biom_readin, "biomass")
C3_ung_FF_plai_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-ung-plai.nc")
C3_ung_FF_plai <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_FF_plai_readin, "plai")
C3_ung_FF_aet_d_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-ung-aet-d.nc")
C3_ung_FF_aet_d <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_FF_aet_d_readin, "aet")
C3_ung_FF_wsoi_d_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-ung-wsoi-d.nc")
C3_ung_FF_wsoi_d <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_FF_wsoi_d_readin, "wsoi")
# No PFT
C3_ung_FF_pasture_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-ung-pasture.nc")
C3_ung_FF_agbiom <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_FF_pasture_readin, "agbiom")
C3_ung_FF_panpp <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_FF_pasture_readin, "panpp")
C3_ung_FF_pbnpp <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_FF_pasture_readin, "pbnpp")
C3_ung_FF_grazedbiom <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_FF_pasture_readin, "grazedbiom")
C3_ung_FF_l3agbiomfrac <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_FF_pasture_readin, "l3agbiomfrac")
# Annual
C3_ung_FF_npp_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-ung-npp.nc")
C3_ung_FF_anpptot <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_FF_npp_readin, "anpptot")
C3_ung_FF_npptot <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_FF_npp_readin, "npptot")
C3_ung_FF_npp <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_FF_npp_readin, "npp")
C3_ung_FF_gsdays <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_FF_npp_readin, "gsdays")
C3_ung_FF_aet_y_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-ung-aet-y.nc")
C3_ung_FF_aet_y <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_FF_aet_y_readin, "aet")
C3_ung_FF_wsoi_y_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-ung-wsoi-y.nc")
C3_ung_FF_wsoi_y <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_FF_wsoi_y_readin, "wsoi")
C3_ung_FF_vegtype0_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-ung-vegtype0.nc")
C3_ung_FF_vegtype0 <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_FF_vegtype0_readin, "vegtype0")
C3_ung_FF_csoi_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-ung-csoi.nc")
C3_ung_FF_totcsoi <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_FF_csoi_readin, "totcsoi")
C3_ung_FF_gsl3l4_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-ung-gsl3l4.nc")
C3_ung_FF_gslenl3 <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_FF_gsl3l4_readin, "gslenl3")
C3_ung_FF_gstdl3 <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_FF_gsl3l4_readin, "gstdl3")
C3_ung_FF_drain_nleachy_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-ung-drain_nleachy.nc")
C3_ung_FF_no3leach_idepth <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_FF_drain_nleachy_readin, "no3leach_idepth")
C3_ung_FF_prunoff_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-ung-prunoff.nc")
C3_ung_FF_atotrunp <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_FF_prunoff_readin, "atotrunp")

## 2-Day Rotation
# Daily
C3_rot2_FF_biom_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-rot2-biomass.nc")
C3_rot2_FF_cbiol <- ncvar_get(C3_rot2_FF_biom_readin, "cbiol")
C3_rot2_FF_cbios <- ncvar_get(C3_rot2_FF_biom_readin, "cbios")
C3_rot2_FF_cbiog <- ncvar_get(C3_rot2_FF_biom_readin, "cbiog")
C3_rot2_FF_cbior <- ncvar_get(C3_rot2_FF_biom_readin, "cbior")
C3_rot2_FF_biomass <- ncvar_get(C3_rot2_FF_biom_readin, "biomass")
C3_rot2_FF_plai_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-rot2-plai.nc")
C3_rot2_FF_plai <- ncvar_get(C3_rot2_FF_plai_readin, "plai")
C3_rot2_FF_aet_d_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-rot2-aet-d.nc")
C3_rot2_FF_aet_d <- ncvar_get(C3_rot2_FF_aet_d_readin, "aet")
C3_rot2_FF_wsoi_d_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-rot2-wsoi-d.nc")
C3_rot2_FF_wsoi_d <- ncvar_get(C3_rot2_FF_wsoi_d_readin, "wsoi")
# No PFT
C3_rot2_FF_pasture_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-rot2-pasture.nc")
C3_rot2_FF_agbiom <- ncvar_get(C3_rot2_FF_pasture_readin, "agbiom")
C3_rot2_FF_panpp <- ncvar_get(C3_rot2_FF_pasture_readin, "panpp")
C3_rot2_FF_pbnpp <- ncvar_get(C3_rot2_FF_pasture_readin, "pbnpp")
C3_rot2_FF_grazedbiom <- ncvar_get(C3_rot2_FF_pasture_readin, "grazedbiom")
C3_rot2_FF_l3agbiomfrac <- ncvar_get(C3_rot2_FF_pasture_readin, "l3agbiomfrac")
# Annual
C3_rot2_FF_npp_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-rot2-npp.nc")
C3_rot2_FF_anpptot <- ncvar_get(C3_rot2_FF_npp_readin, "anpptot")
C3_rot2_FF_npptot <- ncvar_get(C3_rot2_FF_npp_readin, "npptot")
C3_rot2_FF_npp <- ncvar_get(C3_rot2_FF_npp_readin, "npp")
C3_rot2_FF_gsdays <- ncvar_get(C3_rot2_FF_npp_readin, "gsdays")
C3_rot2_FF_aet_y_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-rot2-aet-y.nc")
C3_rot2_FF_aet_y <- ncvar_get(C3_rot2_FF_aet_y_readin, "aet")
C3_rot2_FF_wsoi_y_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-rot2-wsoi-y.nc")
C3_rot2_FF_wsoi_y <- ncvar_get(C3_rot2_FF_wsoi_y_readin, "wsoi")
C3_rot2_FF_vegtype0_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-rot2-vegtype0.nc")
C3_rot2_FF_vegtype0 <- ncvar_get(C3_rot2_FF_vegtype0_readin, "vegtype0")
C3_rot2_FF_csoi_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-rot2-csoi.nc")
C3_rot2_FF_totcsoi <- ncvar_get(C3_rot2_FF_csoi_readin, "totcsoi")
C3_rot2_FF_gsl3l4_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-rot2-gsl3l4.nc")
C3_rot2_FF_gslenl3 <- ncvar_get(C3_rot2_FF_gsl3l4_readin, "gslenl3")
C3_rot2_FF_gstdl3 <- ncvar_get(C3_rot2_FF_gsl3l4_readin, "gstdl3")
C3_rot2_FF_drain_nleachy_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-rot2-drain_nleachy.nc")
C3_rot2_FF_no3leach_idepth <- ncvar_get(C3_rot2_FF_drain_nleachy_readin, "no3leach_idepth")
C3_rot2_FF_prunoff_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-rot2-prunoff.nc")
C3_rot2_FF_atotrunp <- ncvar_get(C3_rot2_FF_prunoff_readin, "atotrunp")

## Continuous
# Daily
C3_cont_FF_biom_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-cont-biomass.nc")
C3_cont_FF_cbiol <- ncvar_get(C3_cont_FF_biom_readin, "cbiol")
C3_cont_FF_cbios <- ncvar_get(C3_cont_FF_biom_readin, "cbios")
C3_cont_FF_cbiog <- ncvar_get(C3_cont_FF_biom_readin, "cbiog")
C3_cont_FF_cbior <- ncvar_get(C3_cont_FF_biom_readin, "cbior")
C3_cont_FF_biomass <- ncvar_get(C3_cont_FF_biom_readin, "biomass")
C3_cont_FF_plai_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-cont-plai.nc")
C3_cont_FF_plai <- ncvar_get(C3_cont_FF_plai_readin, "plai")
C3_cont_FF_aet_d_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-cont-aet-d.nc")
C3_cont_FF_aet_d <- ncvar_get(C3_cont_FF_aet_d_readin, "aet")
C3_cont_FF_wsoi_d_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-cont-wsoi-d.nc")
C3_cont_FF_wsoi_d <- ncvar_get(C3_cont_FF_wsoi_d_readin, "wsoi")
# No PFT
C3_cont_FF_pasture_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-cont-pasture.nc")
C3_cont_FF_agbiom <- ncvar_get(C3_cont_FF_pasture_readin, "agbiom")
C3_cont_FF_panpp <- ncvar_get(C3_cont_FF_pasture_readin, "panpp")
C3_cont_FF_pbnpp <- ncvar_get(C3_cont_FF_pasture_readin, "pbnpp")
C3_cont_FF_grazedbiom <- ncvar_get(C3_cont_FF_pasture_readin, "grazedbiom")
C3_cont_FF_l3agbiomfrac <- ncvar_get(C3_cont_FF_pasture_readin, "l3agbiomfrac")
# Annual
C3_cont_FF_npp_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-cont-npp.nc")
C3_cont_FF_anpptot <- ncvar_get(C3_cont_FF_npp_readin, "anpptot")
C3_cont_FF_npptot <- ncvar_get(C3_cont_FF_npp_readin, "npptot")
C3_cont_FF_npp <- ncvar_get(C3_cont_FF_npp_readin, "npp")
C3_cont_FF_gsdays <- ncvar_get(C3_cont_FF_npp_readin, "gsdays")
C3_cont_FF_aet_y_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-cont-aet-y.nc")
C3_cont_FF_aet_y <- ncvar_get(C3_cont_FF_aet_y_readin, "aet")
C3_cont_FF_wsoi_y_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-cont-wsoi-y.nc")
C3_cont_FF_wsoi_y <- ncvar_get(C3_cont_FF_wsoi_y_readin, "wsoi")
C3_cont_FF_vegtype0_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-cont-vegtype0.nc")
C3_cont_FF_vegtype0 <- ncvar_get(C3_cont_FF_vegtype0_readin, "vegtype0")
C3_cont_FF_csoi_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-cont-csoi.nc")
C3_cont_FF_totcsoi <- ncvar_get(C3_cont_FF_csoi_readin, "totcsoi")
C3_cont_FF_gsl3l4_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-cont-gsl3l4.nc")
C3_cont_FF_gslenl3 <- ncvar_get(C3_cont_FF_gsl3l4_readin, "gslenl3")
C3_cont_FF_gstdl3 <- ncvar_get(C3_cont_FF_gsl3l4_readin, "gstdl3")
C3_cont_FF_drain_nleachy_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-cont-drain_nleachy.nc")
C3_cont_FF_no3leach_idepth <- ncvar_get(C3_cont_FF_drain_nleachy_readin, "no3leach_idepth")
C3_cont_FF_prunoff_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-cont-prunoff.nc")
C3_cont_FF_atotrunp <- ncvar_get(C3_cont_FF_prunoff_readin, "atotrunp")


CO2 <- read_csv("CO2_historical_NOAA2021.csv")
CO2 <- CO2 %>%
  filter(Year >= 1961) %>%
  dplyr::select(-Year)

FF_waterbal_readin <- nc_open("FF-waterbal.nc")
FF_annualprec <- ncvar_get(FF_waterbal_readin, "annualprec")

#### Franbrook Farm runs
### C3 Only
### Spinup
# Daily
spinup_FF_daily_all_df <- data.frame(day=date_spinup,PFT="C3 Grass",biomass=spinup_FF_biomass[12,],cbiol=spinup_FF_cbiol[12,],
                                        cbios=spinup_FF_cbios[12,],cbiog=spinup_FF_cbiog[12,],cbior=spinup_FF_cbior[12,],
                                        plai=spinup_FF_plai[12,],SimulationType="Spinup",Management="Ungrazed",
                                        Location="FF",Lat=42.73796,Lon=-89.75369,agbiom=spinup_FF_agbiom,
                                        grazedbiom=spinup_FF_grazedbiom,l3agbiomfrac=spinup_FF_l3agbiomfrac,
                                        panpp=spinup_FF_panpp,pbnpp=spinup_FF_pbnpp)
# Annual
spinup_FF_yearly_all_df <- data.frame(year=year_spinup,anpptot=spinup_FF_anpptot,npptot=spinup_FF_npptot,C4_npp=spinup_FF_npp[11,],
                                       C3_npp=spinup_FF_npp[12,],aet_y=spinup_FF_aet_y,wsoi_y=spinup_FF_wsoi_y,
                                       SimulationType="Spinup",Management="Ungrazed",
                                       totcsoi=spinup_FF_totcsoi,Location="FF",Lat=42.73796,Lon=-89.75369,vegtype0=spinup_FF_vegtype0)

## Ungrazed
# Daily
C3_ung_FF_daily_all_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C3 Grass",biomass=C3_ung_FF_biomass[12,],cbiol=C3_ung_FF_cbiol[12,],
                                        cbios=C3_ung_FF_cbios[12,],cbiog=C3_ung_FF_cbiog[12,],cbior=C3_ung_FF_cbior[12,],
                                        plai=C3_ung_FF_plai[12,],SimulationType="Only C3 grass allowed",Management="Ungrazed",
                                        Location="FF",Lat=42.73796,Lon=-89.75369,agbiom=C3_ung_FF_agbiom,grazedbiom=C3_ung_FF_grazedbiom,
                                        l3agbiomfrac=C3_ung_FF_l3agbiomfrac,panpp=C3_ung_FF_panpp,pbnpp=C3_ung_FF_pbnpp)
# Annual
C3_ung_FF_yearly_all_df <- data.frame(year=year,anpptot=C3_ung_FF_anpptot,npptot=C3_ung_FF_npptot,C4_npp=C3_ung_FF_npp[11,],
                                       C3_npp=C3_ung_FF_npp[12,],aet_y=C3_ung_FF_aet_y,wsoi_y=C3_ung_FF_wsoi_y,CO2=CO2,
                                       SimulationType="Only C3 grass allowed",Management="Ungrazed",
                                       totcsoi=C3_ung_FF_totcsoi,Location="FF",Lat=42.73796,Lon=-89.75369,vegtype0=C3_ung_FF_vegtype0,
                                       gslenl3=C3_ung_FF_gslenl3,gstdl3=C3_ung_FF_gstdl3,annualprec=FF_annualprec,
                                       no3leach_idepth=C3_ung_FF_no3leach_idepth, atotrunp=C3_ung_FF_atotrunp)
## 2-Day Rotation
# Daily
C3_rot2_FF_daily_all_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C3 Grass",biomass=C3_rot2_FF_biomass[12,],cbiol=C3_rot2_FF_cbiol[12,],
                                        cbios=C3_rot2_FF_cbios[12,],cbiog=C3_rot2_FF_cbiog[12,],cbior=C3_rot2_FF_cbior[12,],
                                        plai=C3_rot2_FF_plai[12,],SimulationType="Only C3 grass allowed",Management="2-Day Rotation",
                                        Location="FF",Lat=42.73796,Lon=-89.75369,agbiom=C3_rot2_FF_agbiom,grazedbiom=C3_rot2_FF_grazedbiom,
                                        l3agbiomfrac=C3_rot2_FF_l3agbiomfrac,panpp=C3_rot2_FF_panpp,pbnpp=C3_rot2_FF_pbnpp)
# Annual
C3_rot2_FF_yearly_all_df <- data.frame(year=year,anpptot=C3_rot2_FF_anpptot,npptot=C3_rot2_FF_npptot,C4_npp=C3_rot2_FF_npp[11,],
                                       C3_npp=C3_rot2_FF_npp[12,],aet_y=C3_rot2_FF_aet_y,wsoi_y=C3_rot2_FF_wsoi_y,CO2=CO2,
                                       SimulationType="Only C3 grass allowed",Management="2-Day Rotation",
                                       totcsoi=C3_rot2_FF_totcsoi,Location="FF",Lat=42.73796,Lon=-89.75369,vegtype0=C3_rot2_FF_vegtype0,
                                       gslenl3=C3_rot2_FF_gslenl3,gstdl3=C3_rot2_FF_gstdl3,annualprec=FF_annualprec,
                                       no3leach_idepth=C3_rot2_FF_no3leach_idepth, atotrunp=C3_rot2_FF_atotrunp)
## Continuous
C3_cont_FF_daily_all_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C3 Grass",biomass=C3_cont_FF_biomass[12,],cbiol=C3_cont_FF_cbiol[12,],
                                        cbios=C3_cont_FF_cbios[12,],cbiog=C3_cont_FF_cbiog[12,],cbior=C3_cont_FF_cbior[12,],
                                        plai=C3_cont_FF_plai[12,],SimulationType="Only C3 grass allowed",Management="Continuous Grazing",
                                        Location="FF",Lat=42.73796,Lon=-89.75369,agbiom=C3_cont_FF_agbiom,grazedbiom=C3_cont_FF_grazedbiom,
                                        l3agbiomfrac=C3_cont_FF_l3agbiomfrac,panpp=C3_cont_FF_panpp,pbnpp=C3_cont_FF_pbnpp)
# Annual
C3_cont_FF_yearly_all_df <- data.frame(year=year,anpptot=C3_cont_FF_anpptot,npptot=C3_cont_FF_npptot,C4_npp=C3_cont_FF_npp[11,],
                                       C3_npp = C3_cont_FF_npp[12,],aet_y=C3_cont_FF_aet_y,wsoi_y=C3_cont_FF_wsoi_y,CO2=CO2,
                                       SimulationType="Only C3 grass allowed",Management="Continuous Grazing",
                                       totcsoi=C3_cont_FF_totcsoi,Location="FF",Lat=42.73796,Lon=-89.75369,vegtype0=C3_cont_FF_vegtype0,
                                       gslenl3=C3_cont_FF_gslenl3,gstdl3=C3_cont_FF_gstdl3,annualprec=FF_annualprec,
                                       no3leach_idepth=C3_cont_FF_no3leach_idepth, atotrunp=C3_cont_FF_atotrunp)

# Combining all Franbrook Farm runs
FF_daily <- rbind(C3_ung_FF_daily_all_df,C3_rot2_FF_daily_all_df,C3_cont_FF_daily_all_df)
FF_yearly <- rbind(C3_ung_FF_yearly_all_df,C3_rot2_FF_yearly_all_df,C3_cont_FF_yearly_all_df)

write.csv(FF_daily, "/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/FF_daily.csv", row.names=FALSE)
write.csv(FF_yearly, "/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/FF_yearly.csv", row.names=FALSE)
write.csv(spinup_FF_daily_all_df, "/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/FF_daily_spinup.csv")
write.csv(spinup_FF_yearly_all_df, "/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/FF_yearly_spinup.csv")
```

```{r}
### M.S. thesis model evaluation

### Validation
FF_daily <- read_csv("FF_daily.csv")
FF_yearly <- read_csv("FF_yearly.csv")
FF_daily_oates <- read_csv("FF_daily_oates.csv")
FF_val <- read_csv("Oates_FF_NPP 06_07 data.csv", skip=5)

##### Creating standard error function
calcSE<-function(x){
  x <- x[is.na(x)==F]
  sd(x)/sqrt(length(x))
}
 
### Franbrook Farm
# Simulation data - generalized model
FF_daily_C3 <- FF_daily %>%
  filter(Location == "FF") %>%
#  filter(Date >= '2006-01-01' & Date <= '2008-01-01') %>%
  filter(Date >= '2006-04-26' & Date <= '2007-11-12') %>%
  dplyr::select(Date,Location,PFT,SimulationType,Management,plai,agbiom,grazedbiom,l3agbiomfrac,biomass) %>%
  filter(agbiom != "NA") %>%
  filter(l3agbiomfrac != "NaN") %>%
  filter(SimulationType == "Only C3 grass allowed") %>%
  filter(plai > 0) %>%
  mutate(agbiom = agbiom/0.45) %>%
  mutate(Management = recode(Management, "2-Day Rotation" = "Rotational Grazing"))

FF_daily_C3_ung <- FF_daily_C3 %>%
  filter(Management == "Ungrazed")
FF_daily_C3_rot2 <- FF_daily_C3 %>%
  filter(Management == "Rotational Grazing")
FF_daily_C3_cont <- FF_daily_C3 %>%
  filter(Management == "Continuous Grazing")

# Simulation data - 2006-2007 dates tailored to real grazing dates (Oates)
FF_daily_C3_oates <- FF_daily_oates %>%
  filter(Location == "FF") %>%
#  filter(Date >= '2006-01-01' & Date <= '2008-01-01') %>%
  filter(Date >= '2006-04-26' & Date <= '2007-11-12') %>%
  dplyr::select(Date,Location,PFT,SimulationType,Management,plai,agbiom,grazedbiom,l3agbiomfrac) %>%
  filter(agbiom != "NA") %>%
  filter(l3agbiomfrac != "NaN") %>%
  filter(SimulationType == "Only C3 grass allowed") %>%
  filter(plai > 0) %>%
  mutate(agbiom = agbiom/0.45) %>%
  mutate(Management = recode(Management, "2-Day Rotation" = "Rotational Grazing"))
FF_daily_C3_ung_oates <- FF_daily_C3_oates %>%
  filter(Management == "Ungrazed")
FF_daily_C3_rot2_oates <- FF_daily_C3_oates %>%
  filter(Management == "Rotational Grazing")
FF_daily_C3_cont_oates <- FF_daily_C3_oates %>%
  filter(Management == "Continuous Grazing")


# Validation data
FF_val_recoded <- FF_val %>%
  mutate(agbiom = g.m2 / 1000) %>%
  rename(Date = date)
FF_val_recoded_ung <- FF_val_recoded %>%
  filter(treatment == "NONE") %>%
  mutate(treatment = recode(treatment, "NONE" = "Ungrazed")) %>%
  group_by(Date) %>%
  mutate(mean_agbiom = mean(agbiom)) %>%
  mutate(SE_agbiom = calcSE(agbiom)) %>%
  mutate(mean_lai = mean(`final LAI`)) %>%
  mutate(SE_lai = calcSE(`final LAI`))
FF_val_recoded_rot2 <- FF_val_recoded %>%
  filter(treatment == "MIRG") %>%
  mutate(treatment = recode(treatment, "MIRG" = "Rotational Grazing")) %>%
  group_by(Date) %>%
  mutate(mean_agbiom = mean(agbiom)) %>%
  mutate(SE_agbiom = calcSE(agbiom)) %>%
  mutate(mean_lai = mean(`final LAI`)) %>%
  mutate(SE_lai = calcSE(`final LAI`))
FF_val_recoded_cont <- FF_val_recoded %>%
  filter(treatment == "CONT") %>%
  mutate(treatment = recode(treatment, "CONT" = "Continuous Grazing")) %>%
  group_by(Date) %>%
  mutate(mean_agbiom = mean(agbiom)) %>%
  mutate(SE_agbiom = calcSE(agbiom)) %>%
  mutate(mean_lai = mean(`final LAI`)) %>%
  mutate(SE_lai = calcSE(`final LAI`))
FF_val_recoded_recombined_all <- rbind(FF_val_recoded_ung, FF_val_recoded_rot2, FF_val_recoded_cont)
FF_val_recoded_recombined <- FF_val_recoded_recombined_all %>%
  distinct(Date, treatment, mean_agbiom, SE_agbiom, mean_lai, SE_lai) %>%
  mutate("Simulation/Observed" = "Observed")


### Validation - Simulation: Only C3 grasses allowed
## R2, MBE, RMSE
# Management : Ungrazed
FF_val_recoded_ung_distinct <- FF_val_recoded_ung %>%
  distinct(Date,mean_agbiom,mean_lai,treatment)
FF_daily_C3_ung_obssim <- merge(FF_val_recoded_ung_distinct, FF_daily_C3_ung, by="Date")
tdStats(m=FF_daily_C3_ung_obssim$plai, o=FF_daily_C3_ung_obssim$mean_lai, functions=c("r2","mbe","rmse"))
tdStats(m=FF_daily_C3_ung_obssim$agbiom, o=FF_daily_C3_ung_obssim$mean_agbiom, functions=c("r2","mbe","rmse"))

#Rotational - Generalized
FF_val_recoded_rot2_distinct <- FF_val_recoded_rot2 %>%
  distinct(Date,mean_agbiom,mean_lai,treatment)
FF_daily_C3_rot2_obssim <- merge(FF_val_recoded_rot2_distinct, FF_daily_C3_rot2, by="Date")
tdStats(m=FF_daily_C3_rot2_obssim$plai, o=FF_daily_C3_rot2_obssim$mean_lai, functions=c("r2","mbe","rmse"))
tdStats(m=FF_daily_C3_rot2_obssim$agbiom, o=FF_daily_C3_rot2_obssim$mean_agbiom, functions=c("r2","mbe","rmse"))

#Rotational - Date-Aligned
FF_val_recoded_rot2_distinct <- FF_val_recoded_rot2 %>%
  distinct(Date,mean_agbiom,mean_lai,treatment)
FF_daily_C3_rot2_obssim_oates <- merge(FF_val_recoded_rot2_distinct, FF_daily_C3_rot2_oates, by="Date")
tdStats(m=FF_daily_C3_rot2_obssim_oates$plai, o=FF_daily_C3_rot2_obssim_oates$mean_lai, functions=c("r2","mbe","rmse"))
tdStats(m=FF_daily_C3_rot2_obssim_oates$agbiom, o=FF_daily_C3_rot2_obssim_oates$mean_agbiom, functions=c("r2","mbe","rmse"))

#Continuous
FF_val_recoded_cont_distinct <- FF_val_recoded_cont %>%
  distinct(Date,mean_agbiom,mean_lai,treatment)
FF_daily_C3_cont_obssim <- merge(FF_val_recoded_cont_distinct, FF_daily_C3_cont, by="Date")
tdStats(m=FF_daily_C3_cont_obssim$plai, o=FF_daily_C3_cont_obssim$mean_lai, functions=c("r2","mbe","rmse"))
tdStats(m=FF_daily_C3_cont_obssim$agbiom, o=FF_daily_C3_cont_obssim$mean_agbiom, functions=c("r2","mbe","rmse"))
```

```{r}
### M.S. thesis graphs and regressions

# Franbrook Farm map
wisconsin <- map_data("state", "wisconsin")
wisconsin_map <- ggplot(wisconsin, aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group)) + geom_polygon(fill = "white", color = "black")
map <- get_map(location =  c(lon = -89.75369, lat = 42.73796), zoom = 12)
map_plot <- ggmap(map)
wisconsin_map +
  map_plot +
  geom_point(aes(x = -89.75369, y = 42.73796), size = 5, color = "red")

## FF map
# Create a map of Wisconsin
map("state", "wisconsin", fill = TRUE, col = "lightgray", lwd = 0.2)
# Add a red point to mark the location - Franbrook Farm
points(-89.75369, 42.73796, col = "red", pch = 19, cex = 2)
# Add a label to the map for Franbrook Farm
text(-89.75369, 42.73796, "Franbrook Farm", col = "black", cex = 0.8, pos = 4)
points(-89.4042, 43.0753, col = "red", pch = 19, cex = 2)
text(-89.4042, 43.0753, "UW-Madison", col = "black", cex = 0.8, pos = 4)

## UW-Madison map
# Create a map of Wisconsin
map("state", "wisconsin", fill = TRUE, col = "lightgray", lwd = 0.2, boundary="lakes")
# Add a red point to mark the location - Franbrook Farm
points(-89.4042, 43.0753, col = "red", pch = 19, cex = 2)W
# Add a label to the map for UW-Madison
text(-89.4042, 43.0753, "UW-Madison", col = "black", cex = 0.8, pos = 4)

## Map of FF and UW-Madison
wi_map <- map_data("state", region = "wisconsin")

pdf(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/Map_FF_UW.pdf")
ggplot() + 
  geom_polygon(data = wi_map, aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group), fill = "lightgray", color = "gray") + 
  geom_point(aes(x = -89.75369, y = 42.73796), color = "#009E73", size = 8) + 
  geom_text(aes(x = -89.75369, y = 42.73796, label = "Franbrook Farm"), color = "black", size = 6, hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.1) +
  geom_point(aes(x = -89.4042, y = 43.0753), color = "red", size = 8) +
  geom_text(aes(x = -89.4042, y = 43.0753, label = "UW-Madison"), color = "black", size = 6, hjust = -0.1, vjust = -0.1) +
  theme_void()

pdf(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/Map_UW.pdf")
ggplot() + 
  geom_polygon(data = wi_map, aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group), fill = "lightgray", color = "gray") + 
  geom_point(aes(x = -89.4042, y = 43.0753), color = "red", size = 8) +
  geom_text(aes(x = -89.4042, y = 43.0753, label = "UW-Madison"), color = "black", size = 6, hjust = -0.1, vjust = -0.1) +
  theme_void()

pdf(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/Map_FF.pdf")
ggplot() + 
  geom_polygon(data = wi_map, aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group), fill = "lightgray", color = "gray") + 
  geom_point(aes(x = -89.75369, y = 42.73796), color = "#009E73", size = 8) + 
  geom_text(aes(x = -89.75369, y = 42.73796, label = "Franbrook Farm"), color = "black", size = 6, hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.1) +
  theme_void()

map("state", "wisconsin", fill = TRUE, col = "lightgray", lwd = 0.2)
points(-89.75369, 42.73796, col = "#009E73", pch = 19, cex = 2)
text(-89.75369, 42.73796, "Franbrook Farm", col = "black", cex = 0.8, pos = 4)
points(-89.4042, 43.0753, col = "red", pch = 19, cex = 2)
text(-89.4042, 43.0753, "UW-Madison", col = "black", cex = 0.8, pos = 4)


# Graph of different biomass pools
FF_biomass_pools <- FF_daily %>%
  filter(Date >= '2006-04-26' & Date <= '2007-11-12') %>%
  mutate(Leaf = cbiol/biomass) %>%
  mutate(Stem = cbios/biomass) %>%
  mutate(Reproductive = cbiog/biomass) %>%
  mutate(Root = cbior/biomass) %>%
  mutate(Management = recode(Management, "2-Day Rotation" = "Rotational Grazing")) %>%
  dplyr::select(Leaf,Stem,Reproductive,Root,Date,Management) %>%
  melt(value.name='Ratio', id=c('Management','Date')) %>%
  rename(Pool = variable)
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/Biomass_Partitioning_FF_Graph.tiff", units="in", height=5, width=10, res=300)
ggplot(data=FF_biomass_pools, aes(x=Date,y=Ratio)) + geom_line(aes(col=Pool)) +
  xlab("Date") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=70, vjust=0.5),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.5),
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = NA)) +
  ylab("Ratio of Biomass Pool to Total Biomass") + facet_wrap(~Management) + 
  scale_color_manual(values=c("Leaf"="#009E73","Stem"="#0072B2","Root"="#E69F00","Reproductive"="#CC79A7"),
                     breaks=c("Root", "Leaf", "Stem", "Reproductive")) +
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%b %Y", date_breaks = "4 months")

# Graphs of LAI across different grazing management regimes at FF
min(FF_val_recoded_recombined$date)
max(FF_val_recoded_recombined$date)

# Graph of simulated vs. observed LAI for C3
FF_val_recoded_recombined_renamed <- FF_val_recoded_recombined_all %>%
  rename(plai = `final LAI`) %>%
  rename(Management = treatment)

### Generalized vs. Oates vs. Obs LAI
FF_val_recoded_recombined_renamed_rot2 <- FF_val_recoded_recombined_all %>%
  rename(plai = `final LAI`) %>%
  rename(Management = treatment) %>%
  filter(Management == "Rotational Grazing")

### Attempt at new Oates vs. Date-Aligned vs. Generalized Model graph - used lines from legend to update the original figure in powerpoint
# LAI - Rotational Grazing
gen_date_obs_lai <- ggplot() + 
  geom_boxplot(data=FF_val_recoded_recombined_renamed_rot2, width=8, aes(x=Date, y=plai, group=Date, col="Evaluation Data")) +
  geom_line(data=FF_daily_C3_rot2, aes(x=Date, y=plai, col="Generalized Model")) +
  geom_line(data=FF_daily_C3_rot2_oates, aes(x=Date, y=plai, col="Date-Aligned Model")) +
  ggtitle("Leaf Area Index") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=70, vjust=0.5),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 0.5),
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none") +
  ylab(expression("Daily Leaf Area Index (m"^"2"*" m"^-2*")")) + 
  xlab("Date") + 
  scale_x_date(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(8)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(6)) +
  scale_colour_manual(name="Data Source", values=c("Generalized Model"="#009E73","Date-Aligned Model"="#E69F00", "Evaluation Data"="#000000"))

# Aboveground Biomass - Rotational Grazing
gen_date_obs_agbiom <- ggplot() + 
  geom_boxplot(data=FF_val_recoded_recombined_renamed_rot2, width=8, aes(x=Date, y=agbiom, group=Date, col="Evaluation Data")) +
  geom_line(data=FF_daily_C3_rot2, aes(x=Date, y=agbiom, col="Generalized Model")) +
  geom_line(data=FF_daily_C3_rot2_oates, aes(x=Date, y=agbiom, col="Date-Aligned Model")) +
  ggtitle("Aboveground Biomass") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=70, vjust=0.5),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 0.5),
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none") +
  ylab(expression("Aboveground Biomass (kg m"^-2*")")) + 
  xlab("Date") + 
  scale_x_date(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(8)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(6)) +
  scale_colour_manual(name="Data Source", values=c("Generalized Model"="#009E73","Date-Aligned Model"="#E69F00", "Evaluation Data"="#000000"))

# Custom legend
legend_data <- data.frame(
  x = c(1, 2, 3),
  y = c(1, 1, 1),
  label = factor(c("Generalized Model", "Date-Aligned Model", "Evaluation Data"), 
                 levels = c("Generalized Model", "Date-Aligned Model", "Evaluation Data"))
)

custom_legend <- ggplot(legend_data, aes(x, y, color = label)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = label), linewidth = 1, show.legend = TRUE) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = label), size = 3, show.legend = TRUE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Generalized Model"="#009E73", "Date-Aligned Model"="#E69F00", "Evaluation Data"="#000000")) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("Generalized Model"=1, "Date-Aligned Model"=1, "Evaluation Data"=0)) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("Generalized Model"=NA, "Date-Aligned Model"=NA, "Evaluation Data"=16)) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
  guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Data Source", 
                              override.aes = list(
                                linetype = c(1, 1, 0),
                                shape = c(NA, NA, 16)
                              )))

# Extract the legend
legend <- get_legend(custom_legend)

# Combine plots and custom legend
combined_plot <- ggarrange(gen_date_obs_lai, gen_date_obs_agbiom, ncol = 2, labels = c("A", "B"))
final_plot <- arrangeGrob(combined_plot, legend, ncol = 1, heights = c(10, 1))

# Save the final plot
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/Gen_vs_Date_vs_Obs_LAI_agbiom_FF.tiff", units="in", height=5, width=11, res=300)
grid.draw(final_plot)
dev.off()

# Original
# Boxplot
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/Gen_vs_Oates_vs_Obs_LAI_box_FF.tiff", units="in", height=5, width=9, res=300)
gen_date_obs_lai <- ggplot() + geom_boxplot(data=FF_val_recoded_recombined_renamed_rot2,width=8,aes(x=Date,y=plai,group=Date,col="Evaluation Data")) +
  geom_line(data=FF_daily_C3_rot2, aes(x=Date, y=plai, col="Generalized Model")) +
  geom_line(data=FF_daily_C3_rot2_oates, aes(x=Date, y=plai, col="Date-Aligned Model")) +
  ggtitle("Leaf Area Index") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=70, vjust=0.5),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 0.5),
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = NA)) +
  ylab(expression("Daily Leaf Area Index (m"^"2"*" m"^-2*")")) + xlab("Date") + scale_x_date(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(8)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(6)) +
  scale_color_manual(name="Data Source", values=c("Evaluation Data"="#000000","Generalized Model"="#009E73","Date-Aligned Model"="#E69F00"), limits=c("Generalized Model","Date-Aligned Model","Evaluation Data"))
### Generalized vs. Oates vs. Obs Aboveground Biomass
# Boxplot
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/Gen_vs_Oates_vs_Obs_agbiom_box_FF.tiff", units="in", height=5, width=9, res=300)
gen_date_obs_agbiom <- ggplot() + geom_boxplot(data=FF_val_recoded_recombined_renamed_rot2,width=8,aes(x=Date,y=agbiom,group=Date,col="Evaluation Data")) +
  geom_line(data=FF_daily_C3_rot2, aes(x=Date, y=agbiom, col="Generalized Model")) +
  geom_line(data=FF_daily_C3_rot2_oates, aes(x=Date, y=agbiom, col="Date-Aligned Model")) +
  ggtitle("Aboveground Biomass") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=70, vjust=0.5),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 0.5),
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = NA)) +
  ylab(expression("Aboveground Biomass (kg m"^-2*")")) + xlab("Date") + scale_x_date(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(8)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(6)) +
  scale_color_manual(name="Data Source", values=c("Evaluation Data"="#000000","Generalized Model"="#009E73","Date-Aligned Model"="#E69F00"), limits=c("Generalized Model","Date-Aligned Model","Evaluation Data"))
### Generalized vs. Date-aligned vs. Obs combined
combined_plot <- ggarrange(gen_date_obs_lai, gen_date_obs_agbiom, common.legend = TRUE, legend = "bottom", labels = c("A", "B"))
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/Gen_vs_Date_vs_Obs_LAI_agbiom_FF.tiff", units="in", height=5, width=11, res=300)
combined_plot + theme(plot.margin = margin(t = 1, r = 1, b = 0.5, l = 1, "lines"))


### Graphs of simulated vs. observed LAI for C3
# Line graphs vs. boxplots
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/Sim_vs_Obs_LAI_box_FF.tiff", units="in", height=8, width=11, res=300)
lai_simvsobs_graph <- ggplot() + geom_boxplot(data=FF_val_recoded_recombined_renamed,width=8,aes(x=Date,y=plai,group=Date,col=Management)) +
  geom_line(data=FF_daily_C3, aes(x=Date, y=plai, col=Management)) +
  ggtitle("Leaf Area Index") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=70, vjust=0.5),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 0.5),
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = NA)) +
  ylab(expression("Daily Leaf Area Index (m"^"2"*" m"^-2*")")) + xlab("Date") + scale_x_date(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(8)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(6)) + facet_wrap(~Management, ncol=1) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c("Rotational Grazing"="#009E73","Continuous Grazing"="#D55E00","Ungrazed"="#56B4E9"))
### Graphs of simulated vs. observed agbiom for C3
# Line graphs vs. boxplots
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/Sim_vs_Obs_agbiom_box_FF.tiff", units="in", height=8, width=13, res=300)
agbiom_simvsobs_graph <- ggplot() + geom_boxplot(data=FF_val_recoded_recombined_renamed,width=8,aes(x=Date,y=agbiom,group=Date,col=Management)) +
  geom_line(data=FF_daily_C3, aes(x=Date, y=agbiom, col=Management)) +
  ggtitle("Aboveground Biomass") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=70, vjust=0.5),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 0.5),
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = NA)) +
  ylab(expression("Aboveground Biomass (kg m"^-2*")")) + xlab("Date") + scale_x_date(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(8)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(6)) + facet_wrap(~Management, ncol=1) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c("Rotational Grazing"="#009E73","Continuous Grazing"="#D55E00","Ungrazed"="#56B4E9"))
# Combined graphs of simulated vs. observed LAI and aboveground biomass and for C3
combined_plot <- ggarrange(lai_simvsobs_graph, agbiom_simvsobs_graph, common.legend = TRUE, legend="bottom", labels=c("A","B"), ncol=2)
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/Sim_vs_Obs_LAI_agbiom_FF.tiff", units="in", height=8, width=10, res=300)
combined_plot + theme(plot.margin = margin(t = 1, r = 1, b = 0.5, l = 1, "lines"))


### Graphs of observed LAI for C3
# Boxplots
FF_val_ung <- FF_val_recoded_recombined_renamed %>%
  filter(Management == "Ungrazed")
FF_val_rot2 <- FF_val_recoded_recombined_renamed %>%
  filter(Management == "Rotational Grazing")
FF_val_cont <- FF_val_recoded_recombined_renamed %>%
  filter(Management == "Continuous Grazing")

# UNG LAI - Observed
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/Obs_LAI_UNG_box_FF.tiff", units="in", height=4, width=7, res=300)
ggplot() + geom_boxplot(data=FF_val_ung,width=8,aes(x=Date,y=plai,group=Date,col=Management)) +
  ggtitle("Observed LAI for Ungrazed") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=90, vjust=0.5)) +
  ylab("Daily Leaf Area Index (m2 m-2)") + xlab("Date") + scale_x_date(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(8)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(6)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c("Ungrazed"="#56B4E9"))
# UNG LAI - Observed vs. Simulated
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/Obs_Sim_LAI_UNG_box_FF.tiff", units="in", height=4, width=7, res=300)
ggplot() + geom_boxplot(data=FF_val_ung,width=8,aes(x=Date,y=plai,group=Date,col=Management)) +
  geom_line(data=FF_daily_C3_ung, aes(x=Date, y=plai, col=Management)) +
  ggtitle("Simulated vs. Observed LAI for Ungrazed") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=90, vjust=0.5)) +
  ylab("Daily Leaf Area Index (m2 m-2)") + xlab("Date") + scale_x_date(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(8)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(6)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c("Ungrazed"="#56B4E9"))
# UNG agbiom - Observed
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/Obs_agbiom_UNG_box_FF.tiff", units="in", height=4, width=7, res=300)
ggplot() + geom_boxplot(data=FF_val_ung,width=8,aes(x=Date,y=agbiom,group=Date,col=Management)) +
  ggtitle("Observed Aboveground Biomass for Ungrazed") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=90, vjust=0.5)) +
  ylab("Aboveground Biomass (kg m-2)") + xlab("Date") + scale_x_date(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(8)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(6)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c("Ungrazed"="#56B4E9"))
# UNG agbiom - Observed vs. Simulated
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/Obs_Sim_agbiom_UNG_box_FF.tiff", units="in", height=4, width=7, res=300)
ggplot() + geom_boxplot(data=FF_val_ung,width=8,aes(x=Date,y=agbiom,group=Date,col=Management)) +
  geom_line(data=FF_daily_C3_ung, aes(x=Date, y=agbiom, col=Management)) +
  ggtitle("Simulated vs. Observed Aboveground Biomass for Ungrazed") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=90, vjust=0.5)) +
  ylab("Aboveground Biomass (kg m-2)") + xlab("Date") + scale_x_date(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(8)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(6)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c("Ungrazed"="#56B4E9"))

# CONT LAI - Observed
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/Obs_LAI_CONT_box_FF.tiff", units="in", height=4, width=7, res=300)
ggplot() + geom_boxplot(data=FF_val_cont,width=8,aes(x=Date,y=plai,group=Date,col=Management)) +
  ggtitle("Observed LAI for Continuous") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=90, vjust=0.5)) +
  ylab("Daily Leaf Area Index (m2 m-2)") + xlab("Date") + scale_x_date(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(8)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(6)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c("Continuous Grazing"="#D55E00"))
# CONT LAI - Observed vs. Simulated
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/Obs_Sim_LAI_CONT_box_FF.tiff", units="in", height=4, width=7, res=300)
ggplot() + geom_boxplot(data=FF_val_cont,width=8,aes(x=Date,y=plai,group=Date,col=Management)) +
  geom_line(data=FF_daily_C3_cont, aes(x=Date, y=plai, col=Management)) +
  ggtitle("Simulated vs. Observed LAI for Continuous") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=90, vjust=0.5)) +
  ylab("Daily Leaf Area Index (m2 m-2)") + xlab("Date") + scale_x_date(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(8)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(6)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c("Continuous Grazing"="#D55E00"))
# CONT agbiom - Observed
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/Obs_agbiom_CONT_box_FF.tiff", units="in", height=4, width=7, res=300)
ggplot() + geom_boxplot(data=FF_val_cont,width=8,aes(x=Date,y=agbiom,group=Date,col=Management)) +
  ggtitle("Observed Aboveground Biomass for Continuous") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=90, vjust=0.5)) +
  ylab("Aboveground Biomass (kg m-2)") + xlab("Date") + scale_x_date(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(8)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(6)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c("Continuous Grazing"="#D55E00"))
# CONT agbiom - Observed vs. Simulated
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/Obs_Sim_agbiom_CONT_box_FF.tiff", units="in", height=4, width=7, res=300)
ggplot() + geom_boxplot(data=FF_val_cont,width=8,aes(x=Date,y=agbiom,group=Date,col=Management)) +
  geom_line(data=FF_daily_C3_cont, aes(x=Date, y=agbiom, col=Management)) +
  ggtitle("Simulated vs. Observed Aboveground Biomass for Continuous") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=90, vjust=0.5)) +
  ylab("Aboveground Biomass (kg m-2)") + xlab("Date") + scale_x_date(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(8)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(6)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c("Continuous Grazing"="#D55E00"))

# ROT2 LAI - Observed
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/Obs_LAI_ROT2_box_FF.tiff", units="in", height=4, width=7, res=300)
ggplot() + geom_boxplot(data=FF_val_rot2,width=8,aes(x=Date,y=plai,group=Date,col=Management)) +
  ggtitle("Observed LAI for 2-Day Rotation") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=90, vjust=0.5)) +
  ylab("Daily Leaf Area Index (m2 m-2)") + xlab("Date") + scale_x_date(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(8)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(6)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c("2-Day Rotation"="#009E73"))
# ROT2 LAI - Observed vs. Simulated
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/Obs_Sim_LAI_ROT2_box_FF.tiff", units="in", height=4, width=7, res=300)
ggplot() + geom_boxplot(data=FF_val_rot2,width=8,aes(x=Date,y=plai,group=Date,col=Management)) +
  geom_line(data=FF_daily_C3_rot2, aes(x=Date, y=plai, col=Management)) +
  ggtitle("Simulated vs. Observed LAI for 2-Day Rotation") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=90, vjust=0.5)) +
  ylab("Daily Leaf Area Index (m2 m-2)") + xlab("Date") + scale_x_date(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(8)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(6)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c("2-Day Rotation"="#009E73"))
# ROT2 agbiom - Observed
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/Obs_agbiom_ROT2_box_FF.tiff", units="in", height=4, width=7, res=300)
ggplot() + geom_boxplot(data=FF_val_rot2,width=8,aes(x=Date,y=agbiom,group=Date,col="Management")) +
  ggtitle("Observed Aboveground Biomass for 2-Day Rotation") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=90, vjust=0.5)) +
  ylab("Aboveground Biomass (kg m-2)") + xlab("Date") + scale_x_date(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(8)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(6)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c("2-Day Rotation"="#009E73"))
# ROT2 agbiom - Observed vs. Simulated
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/Obs_Sim_agbiom_ROT2_box_FF.tiff", units="in", height=4, width=7, res=300)
ggplot() + # geom_boxplot(data=FF_val_rot2,width=8,aes(x=Date,y=agbiom,group=Date,col="Management")) +
  geom_line(data=FF_daily_C3_rot2, aes(x=Date, y=agbiom, col=Management)) +
  ggtitle("Simulated vs. Observed Aboveground Biomass for 2-Day Rotation") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=90, vjust=0.5)) +
  ylab("Aboveground Biomass (kg m-2)") + xlab("Date") + scale_x_date(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(8)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(6)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c("2-Day Rotation - Simulated"="#009E73"))

# Gen vs Obs
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/Gen_vs_Oates_vs_Obs_agbiom_presentation.tiff", units="in", height=4, width=7, res=300)
ggplot() + geom_boxplot(data=FF_val_recoded_recombined_renamed_rot2,width=8,aes(x=Date,y=agbiom,group=Date,col="Evaluation Data")) +
  geom_line(data=FF_daily_C3_rot2, aes(x=Date, y=agbiom, col="Generalized Model")) +
  geom_line(data=FF_daily_C3_rot2_oates, aes(x=Date, y=agbiom, col="Date-Aligned Model")) +
  ggtitle("Generalized vs. Observed 2-Day Rotation - Aboveground Biomass") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=90, vjust=0.5)) +
  ylab("Daily Leaf Area Index (m2 m-2)") + xlab("Date") + scale_x_date(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(8)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(6)) +
  scale_color_manual(name="Data Source", values=c("Evaluation Data"="#000000","Generalized Model"="#009E73","Date-Aligned Model"="#E69F00"))

# Grazed biomass t-test
FF_daily_C3_grazed <- FF_daily %>%
  filter(Location == "FF") %>%
  filter(Date >= '1979-01-01') %>%
#  filter(Date >= '2006-04-26' & Date <= '2007-11-12') %>%
  dplyr::select(Date,Location,PFT,SimulationType,Management,plai,agbiom,grazedbiom,l3agbiomfrac,panpp,pbnpp) %>%
  filter(agbiom != "NA") %>%
  filter(l3agbiomfrac != "NaN") %>%
  filter(SimulationType == "Only C3 grass allowed") %>%
  filter(plai > 0) %>%
  mutate(agbiom = agbiom/0.45) %>%
  mutate(grazedbiom = grazedbiom/0.45) %>%
  mutate(panpp = panpp/0.45) %>%
  mutate(pbnpp = pbnpp/0.45) %>%
  mutate(ptnpp = panpp + pbnpp) %>%
  filter(Management != "Ungrazed")
t.test(data=FF_daily_C3_grazed, grazedbiom ~ Management) # Not significant from 2006-2006, is significant using whole timeframe (0.386 vs. 0.355)
t.test(data=FF_daily_C3_grazed, agbiom ~ Management) # Is significantly higher in rotation over whole time (0.211 vs. 0.151 kg m-2 (P<0.001))
t.test(data=FF_daily_C3_grazed, panpp ~ Management)




# Post validation/evaluation graphs
# Graph of yearly NPP comparisons for different grass types
FF_yearly <- read_csv("FF_yearly.csv")
FF_yearly_NPP <- FF_yearly %>%
  filter(Year >= 1979) %>%
  mutate(npptot = npptot/(0.45)) %>%
  mutate(anpptot = anpptot/(0.45))

# Calculating maximum LAI for each year
FF_daily_max_LAI <- FF_daily %>%
  filter(Date >= '1979-01-01') %>%
  dplyr::select(Date,Management,plai) %>%
  mutate(Year = lubridate::floor_date(Date, "year")) %>%
  mutate(Year = sub("^(\\d{4}).*$", "\\1", Year)) %>%
  group_by(Year, Management) %>%
  mutate(max_LAI = max(plai)) %>%
  distinct(Management,Year,max_LAI) %>%
  mutate(Year = as.double(Year))

# Creating separate dataframes based on management
FF_yearly_NPP_max_LAI <- FF_yearly_NPP %>%
  left_join(FF_daily_max_LAI, FF_yearly_NPP, by=c("Year","Management")) %>%
  mutate(anpp_npp_ratio = anpptot/npptot) %>%
  mutate(wue = anpptot/aet_y)
FF_yearly_NPP_ung <- FF_yearly_NPP_max_LAI %>%
  filter(Management == "Ungrazed")
FF_yearly_NPP_rot2 <- FF_yearly_NPP_max_LAI %>%
  filter(Management == "2-Day Rotation")
FF_yearly_NPP_cont <- FF_yearly_NPP_max_LAI %>%
  filter(Management == "Continuous Grazing")

### Stats for paper
max(FF_daily_C3_ung_obssim$mean_lai)
max(FF_daily_C3_rot2_obssim$mean_lai)
max(FF_daily_C3_cont_obssim$mean_lai)
view(FF_daily_C3_ung_obssim)
FF_daily_oates_stats_rot2 <- FF_daily_oates %>%
  filter(Location == "FF") %>%
  filter(Date >= '2006-01-01' & Date <= '2008-01-01') %>%
  mutate(agbiom = agbiom/0.45) %>%
  filter(Management == "2-Day Rotation")
max(FF_daily_oates_stats_rot2$plai)
FF_yearly_oates <- read_csv("FF_yearly_oates.csv")
FF_yearly_NPP_oates <- FF_yearly_oates %>%
  filter(Year >= 1979) %>%
  mutate(npptot = npptot/(0.45)) %>%
  mutate(anpptot = anpptot/(0.45))
FF_daily_max_LAI_oates <- FF_daily_oates %>%
  filter(Date >= '1979-01-01') %>%
  dplyr::select(Date,Management,plai) %>%
  mutate(Year = lubridate::floor_date(Date, "year")) %>%
  mutate(Year = sub("^(\\d{4}).*$", "\\1", Year)) %>%
  group_by(Year, Management) %>%
  mutate(max_LAI = max(plai)) %>%
  distinct(Management,Year,max_LAI) %>%
  mutate(Year = as.double(Year))
FF_yearly_NPP_max_LAI_oates <- FF_yearly_NPP_oates %>%
  left_join(FF_daily_max_LAI_oates, FF_yearly_NPP_oates, by=c("Year","Management")) %>%
  mutate(anpp_npp_ratio = anpptot/npptot) %>%
  mutate(wue = anpptot/aet_y) %>%
  filter(Year > 2005) %>%
  filter(Year < 2008) %>%
  dplyr::select(Year, anpptot, npptot, Management, max_LAI)

FF_yearly_NPP_max_LAI_notoates <- FF_yearly_NPP_max_LAI %>%
  filter(Year > 2005) %>%
  filter(Year < 2008) %>%
  dplyr::select(Year, anpptot, npptot, Management, max_LAI)
view(FF_yearly_NPP_max_LAI_oates)
view(FF_yearly_NPP_max_LAI_notoates)


## Gathering means/SDs for each variable across management options
# Max LAI
mean(FF_yearly_NPP_ung$max_LAI)
sd(FF_yearly_NPP_ung$max_LAI)
mean(FF_yearly_NPP_rot2$max_LAI)
sd(FF_yearly_NPP_rot2$max_LAI)
mean(FF_yearly_NPP_cont$max_LAI)
sd(FF_yearly_NPP_cont$max_LAI)
# ANPP
mean(FF_yearly_NPP_ung$anpptot)
sd(FF_yearly_NPP_ung$anpptot)
mean(FF_yearly_NPP_rot2$anpptot)
sd(FF_yearly_NPP_rot2$anpptot)
mean(FF_yearly_NPP_cont$anpptot)
sd(FF_yearly_NPP_cont$anpptot)
# NPP
mean(FF_yearly_NPP_ung$npptot)
sd(FF_yearly_NPP_ung$npptot)
mean(FF_yearly_NPP_rot2$npptot)
sd(FF_yearly_NPP_rot2$npptot)
mean(FF_yearly_NPP_cont$npptot)
sd(FF_yearly_NPP_cont$npptot)
# ANPP:NPP
mean(FF_yearly_NPP_ung$anpp_npp_ratio)
sd(FF_yearly_NPP_ung$anpp_npp_ratio)
mean(FF_yearly_NPP_rot2$anpp_npp_ratio)
sd(FF_yearly_NPP_rot2$anpp_npp_ratio)
mean(FF_yearly_NPP_cont$anpp_npp_ratio)
sd(FF_yearly_NPP_cont$anpp_npp_ratio)
# ET
mean(FF_yearly_NPP_ung$aet_y)
sd(FF_yearly_NPP_ung$aet_y)
mean(FF_yearly_NPP_rot2$aet_y)
sd(FF_yearly_NPP_rot2$aet_y)
mean(FF_yearly_NPP_cont$aet_y)
sd(FF_yearly_NPP_cont$aet_y)
# WUE
mean(FF_yearly_NPP_ung$wue)
sd(FF_yearly_NPP_ung$wue)
mean(FF_yearly_NPP_rot2$wue)
sd(FF_yearly_NPP_rot2$wue)
mean(FF_yearly_NPP_cont$wue)
sd(FF_yearly_NPP_cont$wue)

## Regressions
reg_ung_max_LAI <- lm(data=FF_yearly_NPP_ung, max_LAI ~ Year)
summary(reg_ung_max_LAI)
reg_rot2_max_LAI <- lm(data=FF_yearly_NPP_rot2, max_LAI ~ Year)
summary(reg_rot2_max_LAI)
reg_cont_max_LAI <- lm(data=FF_yearly_NPP_cont, max_LAI ~ Year)
summary(reg_cont_max_LAI)

reg_ung_anpptot <- lm(data=FF_yearly_NPP_ung, anpptot ~ Year)
summary(reg_ung_anpptot)
reg_rot2_anpptot <- lm(data=FF_yearly_NPP_rot2, anpptot ~ Year)
summary(reg_rot2_anpptot)
reg_cont_anpptot <- lm(data=FF_yearly_NPP_cont, anpptot ~ Year)
summary(reg_cont_anpptot)

reg_ung_npptot <- lm(data=FF_yearly_NPP_ung, npptot ~ Year)
summary(reg_ung_npptot)
reg_rot2_npptot <- lm(data=FF_yearly_NPP_rot2, npptot ~ Year)
summary(reg_rot2_npptot)
reg_cont_npptot <- lm(data=FF_yearly_NPP_cont, npptot ~ Year)
summary(reg_cont_npptot)

reg_ung_anpp_npp_ratio <- lm(data=FF_yearly_NPP_ung, anpp_npp_ratio ~ Year)
summary(reg_ung_anpp_npp_ratio)
reg_rot2_anpp_npp_ratio <- lm(data=FF_yearly_NPP_rot2, anpp_npp_ratio ~ Year)
summary(reg_rot2_anpp_npp_ratio)
reg_cont_anpp_npp_ratio <- lm(data=FF_yearly_NPP_cont, anpp_npp_ratio ~ Year)
summary(reg_cont_anpp_npp_ratio)

reg_ung_aet_y <- lm(data=FF_yearly_NPP_ung, aet_y ~ Year)
summary(reg_ung_aet_y)
reg_rot2_aet_y <- lm(data=FF_yearly_NPP_rot2, aet_y ~ Year)
summary(reg_rot2_aet_y)
reg_cont_aet_y <- lm(data=FF_yearly_NPP_cont, aet_y ~ Year)
summary(reg_cont_aet_y)

reg_ung_wue <- lm(data=FF_yearly_NPP_ung, wue ~ Year)
summary(reg_ung_wue)
reg_rot2_wue <- lm(data=FF_yearly_NPP_rot2, wue ~ Year)
summary(reg_rot2_wue)
reg_cont_wue <- lm(data=FF_yearly_NPP_cont, wue ~ Year)
summary(reg_cont_wue)


## ANOVAs/Tukey's tests
aov_max_LAI <- aov(data=FF_yearly_NPP_max_LAI, max_LAI ~ Management)
summary(aov_max_LAI)
TukeyHSD(aov_max_LAI)

aov_anpptot <- aov(data=FF_yearly_NPP_max_LAI, anpptot ~ Management)
summary(aov_anpptot)
TukeyHSD(aov_anpptot)

aov_npptot <- aov(data=FF_yearly_NPP_max_LAI, npptot ~ Management)
summary(aov_npptot)
TukeyHSD(aov_npptot)

aov_anpp_npp_ratio <- aov(data=FF_yearly_NPP_max_LAI, anpp_npp_ratio ~ Management)
summary(aov_anpp_npp_ratio)
TukeyHSD(aov_anpp_npp_ratio)

aov_aet_y <- aov(data=FF_yearly_NPP_max_LAI, aet_y ~ Management)
summary(aov_aet_y)
TukeyHSD(aov_aet_y)

aov_wue <- aov(data=FF_yearly_NPP_max_LAI, wue ~ Management)
summary(aov_wue)
TukeyHSD(aov_wue)

mean(FF_yearly_NPP_ung$gsdays)

view(FF_yearly_NPP_max_LAI)
### Annual variable graph
# ANPPtot graph
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/ANPPtot_graph.tiff", units="in", height=5, width=10, res=300)
anpp_y <- ggplot(data=FF_yearly_NPP_max_LAI, aes(x=Year,y=anpptot)) + geom_line(aes(col=Management)) +
  geom_smooth(method=lm, se=FALSE, linetype="dashed", aes(col=Management)) + ggtitle("Simulated ANPP") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=70, vjust=0.5),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 0.5),
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = NA),
        legend.box.background = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 0.35)) +
  ylab(expression("Annual ANPP (kg m"^-2*")")) + scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(6)) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(5)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c("2-Day Rotation"="#009E73","Continuous Grazing"="#D55E00","Ungrazed"="#56B4E9"))
# NPPtot graph
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/NPPtot_graph.tiff", units="in", height=5, width=10, res=300)
npp_y <- ggplot(data=FF_yearly_NPP_max_LAI, aes(x=Year,y=npptot)) + geom_line(aes(col=Management)) +
  geom_smooth(method=lm, se=FALSE, linetype="dashed", aes(col=Management)) + ggtitle("Simulated Total NPP") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=70, vjust=0.5),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 0.5),
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = NA),
        legend.box.background = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 0.35)) +
  ylab(expression("Total Annual NPP (kg m"^-2*")")) + scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(6)) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(5)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c("2-Day Rotation"="#009E73","Continuous Grazing"="#D55E00","Ungrazed"="#56B4E9"))
# Annual anpp_npp_ratio graph
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/anpp_npp_ratio_graph.tiff", units="in", height=5, width=10, res=300)
anpp_npp_ratio_y <- ggplot(data=FF_yearly_NPP_max_LAI, aes(x=Year,y=anpp_npp_ratio)) + geom_line(aes(col=Management)) +
  geom_smooth(method=lm, se=FALSE, linetype="dashed", aes(col=Management)) + ggtitle("Simulated ANPP:NPP") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=70, vjust=0.5),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 0.5),
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = NA),
        legend.box.background = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 0.35)) +
  ylab("Annual ANPP:NPP") + scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(6)) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(5)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c("2-Day Rotation"="#009E73","Continuous Grazing"="#D55E00","Ungrazed"="#56B4E9"))
# Annual max LAI graph
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/max_LAI_graph.tiff", units="in", height=5, width=10, res=300)
max_lai_y <- ggplot(data=FF_yearly_NPP_max_LAI, aes(x=Year,y=max_LAI)) + geom_line(aes(col=Management)) +
  geom_smooth(method=lm, se=FALSE, linetype="dashed", aes(col=Management)) + ggtitle("Simulated Maximum LAI") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=70, vjust=0.5),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 0.5),
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = NA),
        legend.box.background = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 0.35)) +
  ylab(expression("Annual Maximum LAI (m"^"2"*" m"^-2*")")) + scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(6)) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(5)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c("2-Day Rotation"="#009E73","Continuous Grazing"="#D55E00","Ungrazed"="#56B4E9"))
# Annual evapotranspiration graph
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/aet_graph.tiff", units="in", height=5, width=10, res=300)
et_y <- ggplot(data=FF_yearly_NPP_max_LAI, aes(x=Year,y=aet_y)) + geom_line(aes(col=Management)) +
  geom_smooth(method=lm, se=FALSE, linetype="dashed", aes(col=Management)) + ggtitle("Simulated Annual Evapotranspiration") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=70, vjust=0.5),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 0.5),
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = NA),
        legend.box.background = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 0.35)) +
  ylab("Annual ET (mm)") + scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(6)) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(5)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c("2-Day Rotation"="#009E73","Continuous Grazing"="#D55E00","Ungrazed"="#56B4E9"))
# Annual WUE graph
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/wue_graph.tiff", units="in", height=5, width=10, res=300)
wue_y <- ggplot(data=FF_yearly_NPP_max_LAI, aes(x=Year,y=wue)) + geom_line(aes(col=Management)) +
  geom_smooth(method=lm, se=FALSE, linetype="dashed", aes(col=Management)) + ggtitle("Simulated Annual Water Use Efficiency") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=70, vjust=0.5),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 0.5),
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = NA),
        legend.box.background = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 0.35)) +
  ylab(expression("Annual WUE (g C m"^"-2"*" / kg H"[2]*"O m"^"-2"*")")) + scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(6)) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(5)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c("2-Day Rotation"="#009E73","Continuous Grazing"="#D55E00","Ungrazed"="#56B4E9"))
# Combined max_LAI/NPP/ANPP/ANPP:NPP/ET/WUE graph
combined_plot <- ggarrange(anpp_y, npp_y, anpp_npp_ratio_y, max_lai_y, et_y, wue_y, common.legend = TRUE, legend="bottom", labels=c("A","B","C","D","E","F"), nrow=3, ncol=2)
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/allvars_graph.tiff", units="in", height=11, width=9, res=300)
combined_plot + theme(plot.margin = margin(t = 1, r = 1, b = 0.5, l = 1, "lines"))


### FF environmental variables graph
# Annual precipitation graph
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/annualprec_graph.tiff", units="in", height=5, width=10, res=300)
annualprec_graph <- ggplot(data=FF_yearly_NPP_ung, aes(x=Year,y=annualprec)) + geom_line() +
  ggtitle("Total Annual Precipitation") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=70, vjust=0.5),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 0.5),
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = NA),
        legend.box.background = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 0.35)) +
  ylab("Annual Precipitation (mm)") + scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(6)) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(5))
# Growing season temperature graph
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/gstdl3_graph.tiff", units="in", height=5, width=10, res=300)
gstdl3_graph <- ggplot(data=FF_yearly_NPP, aes(x=Year,y=gstdl3)) + geom_line(aes(col=Management)) +
  ggtitle("Mean Air Temperature During Active Growth Period") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=70, vjust=0.5),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 0.5),
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = NA),
        legend.box.background = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 0.35)) +
  ylab("Mean Air Temperature (°C)") + scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(6)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c("2-Day Rotation"="#009E73","Continuous Grazing"="#D55E00","Ungrazed"="#56B4E9")) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(5))
# CO2 levels
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/CO2_graph.tiff", units="in", height=5, width=10, res=300)
CO2_graph <- ggplot(data=FF_yearly_NPP_ung, aes(x=Year,y=CO2)) + geom_line() +
  ggtitle(expression("Annual Atmospheric [CO"[2]*"]")) +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=70, vjust=0.5),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 0.5),
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = NA),
        legend.box.background = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 0.35)) +
  ylab(expression("Annual Atmospheric [CO"[2]*"] (ppm)")) + scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(6)) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(5))
# Growing season length
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/gslenl3_graph.tiff", units="in", height=5, width=10, res=300)
gslenl3_graph <- ggplot(data=FF_yearly_NPP, aes(x=Year,y=gslenl3)) + geom_line(aes(col=Management)) +
  ggtitle("Length of Active Growth Period") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=70, vjust=0.5),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 0.5),
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = NA),
        legend.box.background = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 0.35)) +
  ylab("Length of Active Growth Period (Days)") + scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(6)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c("2-Day Rotation"="#009E73","Continuous Grazing"="#D55E00","Ungrazed"="#56B4E9")) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(5))
# Combined plot
combined_plot <- ggarrange(annualprec_graph, gstdl3_graph, CO2_graph, gslenl3_graph, common.legend = TRUE, legend="bottom", labels=c("A","B","C","D"), nrow=2, ncol=2)
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/enviro_graph.tiff", units="in", height=9, width=10, res=300)
combined_plot + theme(plot.margin = margin(t = 1, r = 1, b = 0.5, l = 1, "lines"))

annualprec_reg <- lm(data=FF_yearly_NPP_ung, annualprec ~ Year)
summary(annualprec_reg)


FF_yearly_NPP_ung_test <- FF_yearly_NPP_ung %>%
  filter(Year < 2010)
annualprec_reg <- lm(data=FF_yearly_NPP_ung_test, Year ~ annualprec)
summary(annualprec_reg)

gstdl3_aov <- aov(data=FF_yearly_NPP, gstdl3 ~ Management)
summary(gstdl3_aov)
TukeyHSD(gstdl3_aov)

gslenl3_aov <- aov(data=FF_yearly_NPP, gslenl3 ~ Management)
summary(gslenl3_aov)
TukeyHSD(gslenl3_aov)

gstdl3_ung_reg <- lm(data=FF_yearly_NPP_ung, Year ~ gstdl3)
summary(gstdl3_ung_reg)
gstdl3_rot2_reg <- lm(data=FF_yearly_NPP_rot2, Year ~ gstdl3)
summary(gstdl3_rot2_reg)
gstdl3_cont_reg <- lm(data=FF_yearly_NPP_cont, Year ~ gstdl3)
summary(gstdl3_cont_reg)
gstdl3_multiple_reg <- lm(data=FF_yearly_NPP_cont, Year ~ gstdl3 + Management)
summary(gstdl3_multiple_reg)

gslenl3_ung_reg <- lm(data=FF_yearly_NPP_ung, Year ~ gslenl3)
summary(gslenl3_ung_reg)
gslenl3_rot2_reg <- lm(data=FF_yearly_NPP_rot2, Year ~ gslenl3)
summary(gslenl3_rot2_reg)
gslenl3_cont_reg <- lm(data=FF_yearly_NPP_cont, Year ~ gslenl3)
summary(gslenl3_cont_reg)


### FF spinup graph
FF_spinup_yearly <- read_csv("FF_yearly_spinup.csv")
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/SpinupVegtype0_graph.tiff", units="in", height=9, width=7, res=200)
ggplot(data=FF_spinup_yearly, aes(x=Year,y=vegtype0)) + geom_line() + facet_grid(Location~.,scales="free_y",switch="y")


### FF scatterplot observed vs regular
# agbiom
FF_daily_C3_oates_agbiom <- FF_daily_C3_oates %>%
  rename(Model = agbiom)
FF_val_recoded_recombined_renamed_agbiom <- FF_val_recoded_recombined_renamed %>%
  rename(Observed = mean_agbiom)
merged_data_agbiom <- merge(FF_daily_C3_oates_agbiom, FF_val_recoded_recombined_renamed_agbiom, by = c("Date","Management"), all.x = TRUE)
filtered_data_agbiom <- merged_data_agbiom[!is.na(merged_data_agbiom$Observed),] %>%
  distinct(Date, Model, Observed, Management, SE_agbiom)

# plai
FF_daily_C3_oates_plai <- FF_daily_C3_oates %>%
  rename(Model = plai)
FF_val_recoded_recombined_renamed_plai <- FF_val_recoded_recombined_renamed %>%
  rename(Observed = mean_lai)
merged_data_plai <- merge(FF_daily_C3_oates_plai, FF_val_recoded_recombined_renamed_plai, by = c("Date","Management"), all.x = TRUE)
filtered_data_plai <- merged_data_plai[!is.na(merged_data_plai$Observed),] %>%
  distinct(Date, Model, Observed, SE_lai, Management)

df.annotations_agbiom <- data.frame(
  Management = unique(filtered_data_agbiom$Management),
  label = c(
    paste0("R^2 == ", format(round(summary(lm(Model ~ Observed, data = filtered_data_agbiom[filtered_data_agbiom$Management == "Rotational Grazing", ]))$r.squared, 2), nsmall = 2)),
    paste0("R^2 == ", format(round(summary(lm(Model ~ Observed, data = filtered_data_agbiom[filtered_data_agbiom$Management == "Continuous Grazing", ]))$r.squared, 2), nsmall = 2)),
    paste0("R^2 == ", format(round(summary(lm(Model ~ Observed, data = filtered_data_agbiom[filtered_data_agbiom$Management == "Ungrazed", ]))$r.squared, 2), nsmall = 2))
  )
)

agbiom_scatterplot <- ggplot(data = filtered_data_agbiom, aes(x = Observed, y = Model)) + 
  geom_point(aes(col = Management, shape = Management)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(x = Observed, ymin = Model - SE_agbiom, ymax = Model + SE_agbiom, col = Management), 
                width = 0.01, alpha = 0.5) +
  ggtitle("Aboveground Biomass") +
  geom_smooth(method = lm, se = FALSE, aes(col = Management)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, vjust = 0.5),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 0.5),
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = NA),
        legend.position = "bottom", # added this line for graphical abstract figure
        plot.margin = margin(t = 5, r = 20, b = 5, l = 5)) + # remove this line for combo fig - might shift to the left
  ylab(expression("Model (kg m"^-2*")")) + 
  xlab(expression("Observed (kg m"^-2*")")) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(6), 
                     limits = c(min(filtered_data_agbiom$Model, na.rm = TRUE) - 0.035, max(filtered_data_agbiom$Model, na.rm = TRUE) + 0.035),
                     expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(6), 
                     limits = c(min(filtered_data_agbiom$Model, na.rm = TRUE) - 0.035, max(filtered_data_agbiom$Model, na.rm = TRUE) + 0.035),
                     expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Rotational Grazing" = "#009E73", "Continuous Grazing" = "#D55E00", "Ungrazed" = "#56B4E9")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(15, 16, 17)) +
  coord_fixed(ratio = 1, 
              xlim = c(min(filtered_data_agbiom$Model, na.rm = TRUE) - 0.035, max(filtered_data_agbiom$Model, na.rm = TRUE) + 0.035),
              ylim = c(min(filtered_data_agbiom$Model, na.rm = TRUE) - 0.035, max(filtered_data_agbiom$Model, na.rm = TRUE) + 0.035)) +
  geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey") +
  geom_text(data = df.annotations_agbiom, aes(x = -Inf, y = +Inf, label = label, color = Management),
            hjust = -0.1, vjust = c(1.4, 2.6, 3.8), size = 3.5, parse = TRUE, show.legend = FALSE)
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/agbiom_scatterplot.tiff", units="in", height=5.2, width=5.2, res=300)
agbiom_scatterplot

df.annotations_plai <- data.frame(
  Management = unique(filtered_data_plai$Management),
  label = c(
    paste0("R^2 == ", format(round(summary(lm(Model ~ Observed, data = filtered_data_plai[filtered_data_plai$Management == "Rotational Grazing", ]))$r.squared, 2), nsmall = 2)),
    paste0("R^2 == ", format(round(summary(lm(Model ~ Observed, data = filtered_data_plai[filtered_data_plai$Management == "Continuous Grazing", ]))$r.squared, 2), nsmall = 2)),
    paste0("R^2 == ", format(round(summary(lm(Model ~ Observed, data = filtered_data_plai[filtered_data_plai$Management == "Ungrazed", ]))$r.squared, 2), nsmall = 2))
  )
)

plai_scatterplot <- ggplot(data = filtered_data_plai, aes(x = Observed, y = Model)) + 
  geom_point(aes(col = Management, shape = Management)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(x = Observed, ymin = Model - SE_lai, ymax = Model + SE_lai, col = Management), 
                width = 0.1, alpha = 0.5) +
  ggtitle("Leaf Area Index") +
  geom_smooth(method = lm, se = FALSE, aes(col = Management)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, vjust = 0.5),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 0.5),
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = NA),
        legend.position = "bottom", # added this line for graphical abstract figure
        plot.margin = margin(t = 5, r = 20, b = 5, l = 5)) + # remove this line for combo fig - might shift to the left
  ylab(expression("Model (m"^"2"*" m"^-2*")")) + 
  xlab(expression("Observed (m"^"2"*" m"^-2*")")) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(6), 
                     limits = c(min(filtered_data_plai$Observed, na.rm = TRUE) - 0.45, max(filtered_data_plai$Observed, na.rm = TRUE) + 0.45),
                     expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(6), 
                     limits = c(min(filtered_data_plai$Observed, na.rm = TRUE) - 0.45, max(filtered_data_plai$Observed, na.rm = TRUE) + 0.45),
                     expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Rotational Grazing" = "#009E73", "Continuous Grazing" = "#D55E00", "Ungrazed" = "#56B4E9")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(15, 16, 17)) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("solid", "dashed", "dotted")) +
  coord_fixed(ratio = 1, 
              xlim = c(min(filtered_data_plai$Observed, na.rm = TRUE) - 0.45, max(filtered_data_plai$Observed, na.rm = TRUE) + 0.45),
              ylim = c(min(filtered_data_plai$Observed, na.rm = TRUE) - 0.45, max(filtered_data_plai$Observed, na.rm = TRUE) + 0.45)) +
  geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey") +
  geom_text(data = df.annotations_plai, aes(x = -Inf, y = +Inf, label = label, color = Management),
            hjust = -0.1, vjust = c(1.4, 2.6, 3.8), size = 3.5, parse = TRUE, show.legend = FALSE)
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/plai_scatterplot.tiff", units="in", height=5.2, width=5.2, res=300)
plai_scatterplot

combined_plot <- ggarrange(agbiom_scatterplot, plai_scatterplot, common.legend = TRUE, legend="bottom", labels=c("A","B"), ncol=2)
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/agbiom_plai_scatterplot.tiff", units="in", height=5, width=9, res=300)
combined_plot + theme(plot.margin = margin(t = 1, r = 1, b = 0.5, l = 1, "lines"))

round(summary(lm(Model ~ Observed, data = filtered_data_agbiom[filtered_data_agbiom$Management == "Ungrazed", ]))$r.squared, 2)
round(summary(lm(Model ~ Observed, data = filtered_data_agbiom[filtered_data_agbiom$Management == "2-Day Rotation", ]))$r.squared, 2)
round(summary(lm(Model ~ Observed, data = filtered_data_agbiom[filtered_data_agbiom$Management == "Continuous Grazing", ]))$r.squared, 2)
round(summary(lm(Model ~ Observed, data = filtered_data_plai[filtered_data_plai$Management == "Ungrazed", ]))$r.squared, 2)
round(summary(lm(Model ~ Observed, data = filtered_data_plai[filtered_data_plai$Management == "2-Day Rotation", ]))$r.squared, 2)
round(summary(lm(Model ~ Observed, data = filtered_data_plai[filtered_data_plai$Management == "Continuous Grazing", ]))$r.squared, 2)


### FF graphical abstract
# Evaluation graphs
FF_daily_C3_oates_recoded <- FF_daily_C3_oates
FF_daily_C3_oates_recoded$Management <- gsub("2-Day Rotation", "2-Day Rotation - Date-Aligned", FF_daily_C3_oates_recoded$Management)
FF_val_recoded_recombined_renamed_graphical_abstract <- FF_val_recoded_recombined_renamed
FF_val_recoded_recombined_renamed_graphical_abstract$Management <- gsub("2-Day Rotation", "2-Day Rotation - Date-Aligned", FF_val_recoded_recombined_renamed_graphical_abstract$Management)
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/graphical_abstract_Sim_vs_Obs_LAI_box_FF.tiff", units="in", height=8, width=11, res=300)
lai_graphical_abstract <- ggplot() + geom_boxplot(data=FF_val_recoded_recombined_renamed_graphical_abstract,width=8,aes(x=Date,y=plai,group=Date,col=Management)) +
  geom_line(data=FF_daily_C3_oates_recoded, aes(x=Date, y=plai, col=Management)) +
  ggtitle("Simulated vs. Observed LAI") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=70, vjust=0.5),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 0.5),
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = NA),
        legend.box.background = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 0.35)) +
  ylab("Daily Leaf Area Index (m2 m-2)") + xlab("Date") + scale_x_date(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(8)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(6)) + facet_wrap(~Management, ncol=1) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c("2-Day Rotation - Date-Aligned"="#009E73","Continuous Grazing"="#D55E00","Ungrazed"="#56B4E9")) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

# ANPPtot graph
anpp_y_GA <- ggplot(data=FF_yearly_NPP_max_LAI, aes(x=Year,y=anpptot)) + geom_line(aes(col=Management)) +
  geom_smooth(method=lm, se=FALSE, aes(col=Management)) + ggtitle("Simulated ANPP") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=70, vjust=0.5),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 0.5),
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = NA),
        legend.box.background = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 0.35)) +
  ylab("Annual ANPP (kg/m2)") + scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(6)) +
```
