```{r}
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(5)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c("2-Day Rotation"="#009E73","Continuous Grazing"="#D55E00","Ungrazed"="#56B4E9"))
# NPPtot graph
npp_y_GA <- ggplot(data=FF_yearly_NPP_max_LAI, aes(x=Year,y=npptot)) + geom_line(aes(col=Management)) +
  geom_smooth(method=lm, se=FALSE, aes(col=Management)) + ggtitle("Simulated Total NPP") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=70, vjust=0.5),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 0.5),
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = NA),
        legend.box.background = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 0.35)) +
  ylab("Total Annual NPP (kg/m2)") + scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(6)) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(5)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c("2-Day Rotation"="#009E73","Continuous Grazing"="#D55E00","Ungrazed"="#56B4E9"))
# Annual WUE graph
wue_y_GA <- ggplot(data=FF_yearly_NPP_max_LAI, aes(x=Year,y=wue)) + geom_line(aes(col=Management)) +
  geom_smooth(method=lm, se=FALSE, aes(col=Management)) + ggtitle("Simulated Annual Water Use Efficiency") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=70, vjust=0.5),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 0.5),
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = NA),
        legend.box.background = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 0.35)) +
  ylab("Annual WUE") + scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(6)) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(5)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c("2-Day Rotation"="#009E73","Continuous Grazing"="#D55E00","Ungrazed"="#56B4E9"))



plot_left <- lai_graphical_abstract
plot_right <- ggarrange(anpp_y_GA, npp_y_GA, wue_y_GA, nrow = 3, common.legend = TRUE, legend = "bottom")

# Increase the right margin of plot_right to create space as well as for the bottom margin
plot_right <- plot_right + theme(plot.margin = margin(l = 20, b = 2, unit = "mm"))

# Add titles to the combined plot
final_plot <- plot_grid(
  plot_grid(plot_left, label_x = 0.5, label_y = 1, hjust = -0.1, vjust = 1.5, rel_widths = c(0.5, 0.5)),
  plot_grid(plot_right, label_x = 0.5, label_y = 1, hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.5, rel_widths = c(0.5, 0.5)),
  nrow = 1, rel_widths = c(0.5, 0.5)
)

# Save the combined plot
tiff(file = "/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/graphical_abstract_combined.tiff",
     units = "in", height = 7, width = 17.5, res = 300)
final_plot
dev.off()

tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/graphical_abstract_combined.tiff", units="in", height=8, width=11, res=300)
plot_grid(plot_left, plot_right, nrow = 1, rel_widths = c(0.5, 0.5))
```

```{r}
# NO3 leaching and P runoff for Eric and Kelsie - idepth = 1.5m
FF_yearly <- read_csv("FF_yearly.csv")

no3leach_idepth_linegraph <- ggplot(data=FF_yearly, aes(x=Year, y=no3leach_idepth)) + geom_line(aes(col=Management)) +
  ggtitle("NO3 Leaching at 1.5m Depth") + ylab("NO3 Leaching at 1.5m Depth (kg/ha)") + ylim(0,0.1)
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/NO3_leaching_1.5m_linegraph.tiff", units="in", height=5, width=7, res=250)
no3leach_idepth_linegraph

atotrunp_linegraph <- ggplot(data=FF_yearly, aes(x=Year, y=atotrunp)) + geom_line(aes(col=Management)) +
  ggtitle("Total P Runoff")
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/atotrunp_linegraph.tiff", units="in", height=5, width=7, res=250)
atotrunp_linegraph

npptot_linegraph <- ggplot(data=FF_yearly, aes(x=Year, y=npptot)) + geom_line(aes(col=Management)) +
  ggtitle("Total NPP")
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/npptot_linegraph.tiff", units="in", height=5, width=7, res=250)
npptot_linegraph


# Doing the same with the old vegetation.f
setwd("/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis")

##### Reading in day and year dataframes
year <- read_csv("Year.csv") # This includes every year from 1961 to 2021

oldveg_FF_npp_readin <- nc_open("oldveg-FF-npp.nc")
oldveg_FF_anpptot <- ncvar_get(oldveg_FF_npp_readin, "anpptot")
oldveg_FF_npptot <- ncvar_get(oldveg_FF_npp_readin, "npptot")
oldveg_FF_drain_nleachy_readin <- nc_open("oldveg-FF-drain_nleachy.nc")
oldveg_FF_no3leach_idepth <- ncvar_get(oldveg_FF_drain_nleachy_readin, "no3leach_idepth")
oldveg_FF_prunoff_readin <- nc_open("oldveg-FF-prunoff.nc")
oldveg_FF_atotrunp <- ncvar_get(oldveg_FF_prunoff_readin, "atotrunp")

oldveg_FF_annual_df <- data.frame(year=year,anpptot=oldveg_FF_anpptot,npptot=oldveg_FF_npptot,
                                       no3leach_idepth=oldveg_FF_no3leach_idepth, atotrunp=oldveg_FF_atotrunp)

write.csv(oldveg_FF_annual_df, "/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/oldveg_FF_yearly.csv", row.names=FALSE)

oldveg_FF_yearly <- read_csv("oldveg_FF_yearly.csv")

oldveg_no3leach_idepth_linegraph <- ggplot(data=oldveg_FF_yearly, aes(x=Year, y=no3leach_idepth)) + geom_line() +
  ggtitle("NO3 Leaching at 1.5m Depth for Old vegetation.f") + ylab("NO3 Leaching at 1.5m Depth (kg/ha)") + ylim(0,0.7)
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/oldveg_NO3_leaching_1.5m_linegraph.tiff", units="in", height=5, width=7, res=200)
oldveg_no3leach_idepth_linegraph

oldveg_atotrunp_linegraph <- ggplot(data=oldveg_FF_yearly, aes(x=Year, y=atotrunp)) + geom_line() +
  ggtitle("Total P Runoff for Old vegetation.f") + ylab("Total P Runoff (kg/ha)")
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/oldveg_atotrunp_linegraph.tiff", units="in", height=5, width=7, res=200)
oldveg_atotrunp_linegraph

oldveg_npptot_linegraph <- ggplot(data=oldveg_FF_yearly, aes(x=Year, y=npptot)) + geom_line() +
  ggtitle("Total NPP for Old vegetation.f") + ylab("Total NPP (kg/m2/year)")
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/oldveg_npptot_linegraph.tiff", units="in", height=5, width=7, res=200)
oldveg_npptot_linegraph

```



```{r}
##### Setting working directory
setwd("/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis")

##### Reading in day and year dataframes
date <- read_csv("Date_daily.csv")
year <- read_csv("Year.csv")

##### Reading in NetCDF data (simulation runs)

#### Arlington runs
### Mixed
## Ungrazed
# Daily
mix_ung_ARL_biom_readin <- nc_open("ARL-mix-ung-biomass.nc")
mix_ung_ARL_cbiol <- ncvar_get(mix_ung_ARL_biom_readin, "cbiol")
mix_ung_ARL_cbios <- ncvar_get(mix_ung_ARL_biom_readin, "cbios")
mix_ung_ARL_cbiog <- ncvar_get(mix_ung_ARL_biom_readin, "cbiog")
mix_ung_ARL_cbior <- ncvar_get(mix_ung_ARL_biom_readin, "cbior")
mix_ung_ARL_biomass <- ncvar_get(mix_ung_ARL_biom_readin, "biomass")
mix_ung_ARL_plai_readin <- nc_open("ARL-mix-ung-plai.nc")
mix_ung_ARL_plai <- ncvar_get(mix_ung_ARL_plai_readin, "plai")
# No PFT
mix_ung_ARL_pasture_readin <- nc_open("ARL-mix-ung-pasture.nc")
mix_ung_ARL_agbiom <- ncvar_get(mix_ung_ARL_pasture_readin, "agbiom")
mix_ung_ARL_grazedbiom <- ncvar_get(mix_ung_ARL_pasture_readin, "grazedbiom")
mix_ung_ARL_l3agbiomfrac <- ncvar_get(mix_ung_ARL_pasture_readin, "l3agbiomfrac")
# Annual
mix_ung_ARL_npp_readin <- nc_open("ARL-mix-ung-npp.nc")
mix_ung_ARL_anpptot <- ncvar_get(mix_ung_ARL_npp_readin, "anpptot")
mix_ung_ARL_npptot <- ncvar_get(mix_ung_ARL_npp_readin, "npptot")
mix_ung_ARL_npp <- ncvar_get(mix_ung_ARL_npp_readin, "npp")
### C3
## Ungrazed
# Daily
C3_ung_ARL_biom_readin <- nc_open("ARL-C3-ung-biomass.nc")
C3_ung_ARL_cbiol <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_ARL_biom_readin, "cbiol")
C3_ung_ARL_cbios <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_ARL_biom_readin, "cbios")
C3_ung_ARL_cbiog <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_ARL_biom_readin, "cbiog")
C3_ung_ARL_cbior <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_ARL_biom_readin, "cbior")
C3_ung_ARL_biomass <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_ARL_biom_readin, "biomass")
C3_ung_ARL_plai_readin <- nc_open("ARL-C3-ung-plai.nc")
C3_ung_ARL_plai <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_ARL_plai_readin, "plai")
# No PFT
C3_ung_ARL_pasture_readin <- nc_open("ARL-C3-ung-pasture.nc")
C3_ung_ARL_agbiom <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_ARL_pasture_readin, "agbiom")
C3_ung_ARL_grazedbiom <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_ARL_pasture_readin, "grazedbiom")
C3_ung_ARL_l3agbiomfrac <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_ARL_pasture_readin, "l3agbiomfrac")
# Annual
C3_ung_ARL_npp_readin <- nc_open("ARL-C3-ung-npp.nc")
C3_ung_ARL_anpptot <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_ARL_npp_readin, "anpptot")
C3_ung_ARL_npptot <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_ARL_npp_readin, "npptot")
C3_ung_ARL_npp <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_ARL_npp_readin, "npp")
### C4
## Ungrazed
# Daily
C4_ung_ARL_biom_readin <- nc_open("ARL-C4-ung-biomass.nc")
C4_ung_ARL_cbiol <- ncvar_get(C4_ung_ARL_biom_readin, "cbiol")
C4_ung_ARL_cbios <- ncvar_get(C4_ung_ARL_biom_readin, "cbios")
C4_ung_ARL_cbiog <- ncvar_get(C4_ung_ARL_biom_readin, "cbiog")
C4_ung_ARL_cbior <- ncvar_get(C4_ung_ARL_biom_readin, "cbior")
C4_ung_ARL_biomass <- ncvar_get(C4_ung_ARL_biom_readin, "biomass")
C4_ung_ARL_plai_readin <- nc_open("ARL-C4-ung-plai.nc")
C4_ung_ARL_plai <- ncvar_get(C4_ung_ARL_plai_readin, "plai")
# No PFT
C4_ung_ARL_pasture_readin <- nc_open("ARL-C4-ung-pasture.nc")
C4_ung_ARL_agbiom <- ncvar_get(C4_ung_ARL_pasture_readin, "agbiom")
C4_ung_ARL_grazedbiom <- ncvar_get(C4_ung_ARL_pasture_readin, "grazedbiom")
C4_ung_ARL_l3agbiomfrac <- ncvar_get(C4_ung_ARL_pasture_readin, "l3agbiomfrac")
# Annual
C4_ung_ARL_npp_readin <- nc_open("ARL-C4-ung-npp.nc")
C4_ung_ARL_anpptot <- ncvar_get(C4_ung_ARL_npp_readin, "anpptot")
C4_ung_ARL_npptot <- ncvar_get(C4_ung_ARL_npp_readin, "npptot")
C4_ung_ARL_npp <- ncvar_get(C4_ung_ARL_npp_readin, "npp")

#### Bison Ridge Ranch runs
### Mixed
## Ungrazed
# Daily
mix_ung_BR_biom_readin <- nc_open("BR-mix-ung-biomass.nc")
mix_ung_BR_cbiol <- ncvar_get(mix_ung_BR_biom_readin, "cbiol")
mix_ung_BR_cbios <- ncvar_get(mix_ung_BR_biom_readin, "cbios")
mix_ung_BR_cbiog <- ncvar_get(mix_ung_BR_biom_readin, "cbiog")
mix_ung_BR_cbior <- ncvar_get(mix_ung_BR_biom_readin, "cbior")
mix_ung_BR_biomass <- ncvar_get(mix_ung_BR_biom_readin, "biomass")
mix_ung_BR_plai_readin <- nc_open("BR-mix-ung-plai.nc")
mix_ung_BR_plai <- ncvar_get(mix_ung_BR_plai_readin, "plai")
# No PFT
mix_ung_BR_pasture_readin <- nc_open("BR-mix-ung-pasture.nc")
mix_ung_BR_agbiom <- ncvar_get(mix_ung_BR_pasture_readin, "agbiom")
mix_ung_BR_grazedbiom <- ncvar_get(mix_ung_BR_pasture_readin, "grazedbiom")
mix_ung_BR_l3agbiomfrac <- ncvar_get(mix_ung_BR_pasture_readin, "l3agbiomfrac")
# Annual
mix_ung_BR_npp_readin <- nc_open("BR-mix-ung-npp.nc")
mix_ung_BR_anpptot <- ncvar_get(mix_ung_BR_npp_readin, "anpptot")
mix_ung_BR_npptot <- ncvar_get(mix_ung_BR_npp_readin, "npptot")
mix_ung_BR_npp <- ncvar_get(mix_ung_BR_npp_readin, "npp")
### C3
## Ungrazed
# Daily
C3_ung_BR_biom_readin <- nc_open("BR-C3-ung-biomass.nc")
C3_ung_BR_cbiol <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_BR_biom_readin, "cbiol")
C3_ung_BR_cbios <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_BR_biom_readin, "cbios")
C3_ung_BR_cbiog <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_BR_biom_readin, "cbiog")
C3_ung_BR_cbior <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_BR_biom_readin, "cbior")
C3_ung_BR_biomass <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_BR_biom_readin, "biomass")
C3_ung_BR_plai_readin <- nc_open("BR-C3-ung-plai.nc")
C3_ung_BR_plai <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_BR_plai_readin, "plai")
# No PFT
C3_ung_BR_pasture_readin <- nc_open("BR-C3-ung-pasture.nc")
C3_ung_BR_agbiom <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_BR_pasture_readin, "agbiom")
C3_ung_BR_grazedbiom <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_BR_pasture_readin, "grazedbiom")
C3_ung_BR_l3agbiomfrac <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_BR_pasture_readin, "l3agbiomfrac")
# Annual
C3_ung_BR_npp_readin <- nc_open("BR-C3-ung-npp.nc")
C3_ung_BR_anpptot <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_BR_npp_readin, "anpptot")
C3_ung_BR_npptot <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_BR_npp_readin, "npptot")
C3_ung_BR_npp <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_BR_npp_readin, "npp")
### C4
## Ungrazed
# Daily
C4_ung_BR_biom_readin <- nc_open("BR-C4-ung-biomass.nc")
C4_ung_BR_cbiol <- ncvar_get(C4_ung_BR_biom_readin, "cbiol")
C4_ung_BR_cbios <- ncvar_get(C4_ung_BR_biom_readin, "cbios")
C4_ung_BR_cbiog <- ncvar_get(C4_ung_BR_biom_readin, "cbiog")
C4_ung_BR_cbior <- ncvar_get(C4_ung_BR_biom_readin, "cbior")
C4_ung_BR_biomass <- ncvar_get(C4_ung_BR_biom_readin, "biomass")
C4_ung_BR_plai_readin <- nc_open("BR-C4-ung-plai.nc")
C4_ung_BR_plai <- ncvar_get(C4_ung_BR_plai_readin, "plai")
# No PFT
C4_ung_BR_pasture_readin <- nc_open("BR-C4-ung-pasture.nc")
C4_ung_BR_agbiom <- ncvar_get(C4_ung_BR_pasture_readin, "agbiom")
C4_ung_BR_grazedbiom <- ncvar_get(C4_ung_BR_pasture_readin, "grazedbiom")
C4_ung_BR_l3agbiomfrac <- ncvar_get(C4_ung_BR_pasture_readin, "l3agbiomfrac")
# Annual
C4_ung_BR_npp_readin <- nc_open("BR-C4-ung-npp.nc")
C4_ung_BR_anpptot <- ncvar_get(C4_ung_BR_npp_readin, "anpptot")
C4_ung_BR_npptot <- ncvar_get(C4_ung_BR_npp_readin, "npptot")
C4_ung_BR_npp <- ncvar_get(C4_ung_BR_npp_readin, "npp")

#### Frankbrook Farm runs
### Mixed
## Ungrazed
# Daily
mix_ung_FF_biom_readin <- nc_open("FF-mix-ung-biomass.nc")
mix_ung_FF_cbiol <- ncvar_get(mix_ung_FF_biom_readin, "cbiol")
mix_ung_FF_cbios <- ncvar_get(mix_ung_FF_biom_readin, "cbios")
mix_ung_FF_cbiog <- ncvar_get(mix_ung_FF_biom_readin, "cbiog")
mix_ung_FF_cbior <- ncvar_get(mix_ung_FF_biom_readin, "cbior")
mix_ung_FF_biomass <- ncvar_get(mix_ung_FF_biom_readin, "biomass")
mix_ung_FF_plai_readin <- nc_open("FF-mix-ung-plai.nc")
mix_ung_FF_plai <- ncvar_get(mix_ung_FF_plai_readin, "plai")
# No PFT
mix_ung_FF_pasture_readin <- nc_open("FF-mix-ung-pasture.nc")
mix_ung_FF_agbiom <- ncvar_get(mix_ung_FF_pasture_readin, "agbiom")
mix_ung_FF_grazedbiom <- ncvar_get(mix_ung_FF_pasture_readin, "grazedbiom")
mix_ung_FF_l3agbiomfrac <- ncvar_get(mix_ung_FF_pasture_readin, "l3agbiomfrac")
# Annual
mix_ung_FF_npp_readin <- nc_open("FF-mix-ung-npp.nc")
mix_ung_FF_anpptot <- ncvar_get(mix_ung_FF_npp_readin, "anpptot")
mix_ung_FF_npptot <- ncvar_get(mix_ung_FF_npp_readin, "npptot")
mix_ung_FF_npp <- ncvar_get(mix_ung_FF_npp_readin, "npp")
## 2-Day Rotation
# Daily
mix_rot2_FF_biom_readin <- nc_open("FF-mix-rot2-biomass.nc")
mix_rot2_FF_cbiol <- ncvar_get(mix_rot2_FF_biom_readin, "cbiol")
mix_rot2_FF_cbios <- ncvar_get(mix_rot2_FF_biom_readin, "cbios")
mix_rot2_FF_cbiog <- ncvar_get(mix_rot2_FF_biom_readin, "cbiog")
mix_rot2_FF_cbior <- ncvar_get(mix_rot2_FF_biom_readin, "cbior")
mix_rot2_FF_biomass <- ncvar_get(mix_rot2_FF_biom_readin, "biomass")
mix_rot2_FF_plai_readin <- nc_open("FF-mix-rot2-plai.nc")
mix_rot2_FF_plai <- ncvar_get(mix_rot2_FF_plai_readin, "plai")
# No PFT
mix_rot2_FF_pasture_readin <- nc_open("FF-mix-rot2-pasture.nc")
mix_rot2_FF_agbiom <- ncvar_get(mix_rot2_FF_pasture_readin, "agbiom")
mix_rot2_FF_grazedbiom <- ncvar_get(mix_rot2_FF_pasture_readin, "grazedbiom")
mix_rot2_FF_l3agbiomfrac <- ncvar_get(mix_rot2_FF_pasture_readin, "l3agbiomfrac")
# Annual
mix_rot2_FF_npp_readin <- nc_open("FF-mix-rot2-npp.nc")
mix_rot2_FF_anpptot <- ncvar_get(mix_rot2_FF_npp_readin, "anpptot")
mix_rot2_FF_npptot <- ncvar_get(mix_rot2_FF_npp_readin, "npptot")
mix_rot2_FF_npp <- ncvar_get(mix_rot2_FF_npp_readin, "npp")
## Continuous
# Daily
mix_cont_FF_biom_readin <- nc_open("FF-mix-cont-biomass.nc")
mix_cont_FF_cbiol <- ncvar_get(mix_cont_FF_biom_readin, "cbiol")
mix_cont_FF_cbios <- ncvar_get(mix_cont_FF_biom_readin, "cbios")
mix_cont_FF_cbiog <- ncvar_get(mix_cont_FF_biom_readin, "cbiog")
mix_cont_FF_cbior <- ncvar_get(mix_cont_FF_biom_readin, "cbior")
mix_cont_FF_biomass <- ncvar_get(mix_cont_FF_biom_readin, "biomass")
mix_cont_FF_plai_readin <- nc_open("FF-mix-cont-plai.nc")
mix_cont_FF_plai <- ncvar_get(mix_cont_FF_plai_readin, "plai")
# No PFT
mix_cont_FF_pasture_readin <- nc_open("FF-mix-cont-pasture.nc")
mix_cont_FF_agbiom <- ncvar_get(mix_cont_FF_pasture_readin, "agbiom")
mix_cont_FF_grazedbiom <- ncvar_get(mix_cont_FF_pasture_readin, "grazedbiom")
mix_cont_FF_l3agbiomfrac <- ncvar_get(mix_cont_FF_pasture_readin, "l3agbiomfrac")
# Annual
mix_cont_FF_npp_readin <- nc_open("FF-mix-cont-npp.nc")
mix_cont_FF_anpptot <- ncvar_get(mix_cont_FF_npp_readin, "anpptot")
mix_cont_FF_npptot <- ncvar_get(mix_cont_FF_npp_readin, "npptot")
mix_cont_FF_npp <- ncvar_get(mix_cont_FF_npp_readin, "npp")

### C3 Only
## Ungrazed
# Daily
C3_ung_FF_biom_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-ung-biomass.nc")
C3_ung_FF_cbiol <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_FF_biom_readin, "cbiol")
C3_ung_FF_cbios <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_FF_biom_readin, "cbios")
C3_ung_FF_cbiog <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_FF_biom_readin, "cbiog")
C3_ung_FF_cbior <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_FF_biom_readin, "cbior")
C3_ung_FF_biomass <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_FF_biom_readin, "biomass")
C3_ung_FF_plai_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-ung-plai.nc")
C3_ung_FF_plai <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_FF_plai_readin, "plai")
# No PFT
C3_ung_FF_pasture_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-ung-pasture.nc")
C3_ung_FF_agbiom <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_FF_pasture_readin, "agbiom")
C3_ung_FF_grazedbiom <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_FF_pasture_readin, "grazedbiom")
C3_ung_FF_l3agbiomfrac <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_FF_pasture_readin, "l3agbiomfrac")
# Annual
C3_ung_FF_npp_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-ung-npp.nc")
C3_ung_FF_anpptot <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_FF_npp_readin, "anpptot")
C3_ung_FF_npptot <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_FF_npp_readin, "npptot")
C3_ung_FF_npp <- ncvar_get(C3_ung_FF_npp_readin, "npp")
## 2-Day Rotation
# Daily
C3_rot2_FF_biom_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-rot2-biomass.nc")
C3_rot2_FF_cbiol <- ncvar_get(C3_rot2_FF_biom_readin, "cbiol")
C3_rot2_FF_cbios <- ncvar_get(C3_rot2_FF_biom_readin, "cbios")
C3_rot2_FF_cbiog <- ncvar_get(C3_rot2_FF_biom_readin, "cbiog")
C3_rot2_FF_cbior <- ncvar_get(C3_rot2_FF_biom_readin, "cbior")
C3_rot2_FF_biomass <- ncvar_get(C3_rot2_FF_biom_readin, "biomass")
C3_rot2_FF_plai_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-rot2-plai.nc")
C3_rot2_FF_plai <- ncvar_get(C3_rot2_FF_plai_readin, "plai")
# No PFT
C3_rot2_FF_pasture_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-rot2-pasture.nc")
C3_rot2_FF_agbiom <- ncvar_get(C3_rot2_FF_pasture_readin, "agbiom")
C3_rot2_FF_grazedbiom <- ncvar_get(C3_rot2_FF_pasture_readin, "grazedbiom")
C3_rot2_FF_l3agbiomfrac <- ncvar_get(C3_rot2_FF_pasture_readin, "l3agbiomfrac")
# Annual
C3_rot2_FF_npp_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-rot2-npp.nc")
C3_rot2_FF_anpptot <- ncvar_get(C3_rot2_FF_npp_readin, "anpptot")
C3_rot2_FF_npptot <- ncvar_get(C3_rot2_FF_npp_readin, "npptot")
C3_rot2_FF_npp <- ncvar_get(C3_rot2_FF_npp_readin, "npp")
## Continuous
# Daily
C3_cont_FF_biom_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-cont-biomass.nc")
C3_cont_FF_cbiol <- ncvar_get(C3_cont_FF_biom_readin, "cbiol")
C3_cont_FF_cbios <- ncvar_get(C3_cont_FF_biom_readin, "cbios")
C3_cont_FF_cbiog <- ncvar_get(C3_cont_FF_biom_readin, "cbiog")
C3_cont_FF_cbior <- ncvar_get(C3_cont_FF_biom_readin, "cbior")
C3_cont_FF_biomass <- ncvar_get(C3_cont_FF_biom_readin, "biomass")
C3_cont_FF_plai_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-cont-plai.nc")
C3_cont_FF_plai <- ncvar_get(C3_cont_FF_plai_readin, "plai")
# No PFT
C3_cont_FF_pasture_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-cont-pasture.nc")
C3_cont_FF_agbiom <- ncvar_get(C3_cont_FF_pasture_readin, "agbiom")
C3_cont_FF_grazedbiom <- ncvar_get(C3_cont_FF_pasture_readin, "grazedbiom")
C3_cont_FF_l3agbiomfrac <- ncvar_get(C3_cont_FF_pasture_readin, "l3agbiomfrac")
# Annual
C3_cont_FF_npp_readin <- nc_open("FF-C3-cont-npp.nc")
C3_cont_FF_anpptot <- ncvar_get(C3_cont_FF_npp_readin, "anpptot")
C3_cont_FF_npptot <- ncvar_get(C3_cont_FF_npp_readin, "npptot")
C3_cont_FF_npp <- ncvar_get(C3_cont_FF_npp_readin, "npp")

### C4 Only
## Ungrazed
# Daily
C4_ung_FF_biom_readin <- nc_open("FF-C4-ung-biomass.nc")
C4_ung_FF_cbiol <- ncvar_get(C4_ung_FF_biom_readin, "cbiol")
C4_ung_FF_cbios <- ncvar_get(C4_ung_FF_biom_readin, "cbios")
C4_ung_FF_cbiog <- ncvar_get(C4_ung_FF_biom_readin, "cbiog")
C4_ung_FF_cbior <- ncvar_get(C4_ung_FF_biom_readin, "cbior")
C4_ung_FF_biomass <- ncvar_get(C4_ung_FF_biom_readin, "biomass")
C4_ung_FF_plai_readin <- nc_open("FF-C4-ung-plai.nc")
C4_ung_FF_plai <- ncvar_get(C4_ung_FF_plai_readin, "plai")
# No PFT
C4_ung_FF_pasture_readin <- nc_open("FF-C4-ung-pasture.nc")
C4_ung_FF_agbiom <- ncvar_get(C4_ung_FF_pasture_readin, "agbiom")
C4_ung_FF_grazedbiom <- ncvar_get(C4_ung_FF_pasture_readin, "grazedbiom")
C4_ung_FF_l3agbiomfrac <- ncvar_get(C4_ung_FF_pasture_readin, "l3agbiomfrac")
# Annual
C4_ung_FF_npp_readin <- nc_open("FF-C4-ung-npp.nc")
C4_ung_FF_anpptot <- ncvar_get(C4_ung_FF_npp_readin, "anpptot")
C4_ung_FF_npptot <- ncvar_get(C4_ung_FF_npp_readin, "npptot")
C4_ung_FF_npp <- ncvar_get(C4_ung_FF_npp_readin, "npp")
## 2-Day Rotation
# Daily
C4_rot2_FF_biom_readin <- nc_open("FF-C4-rot2-biomass.nc")
C4_rot2_FF_cbiol <- ncvar_get(C4_rot2_FF_biom_readin, "cbiol")
C4_rot2_FF_cbios <- ncvar_get(C4_rot2_FF_biom_readin, "cbios")
C4_rot2_FF_cbiog <- ncvar_get(C4_rot2_FF_biom_readin, "cbiog")
C4_rot2_FF_cbior <- ncvar_get(C4_rot2_FF_biom_readin, "cbior")
C4_rot2_FF_biomass <- ncvar_get(C4_rot2_FF_biom_readin, "biomass")
C4_rot2_FF_plai_readin <- nc_open("FF-C4-rot2-plai.nc")
C4_rot2_FF_plai <- ncvar_get(C4_rot2_FF_plai_readin, "plai")
# No PFT
C4_rot2_FF_pasture_readin <- nc_open("FF-C4-rot2-pasture.nc")
C4_rot2_FF_agbiom <- ncvar_get(C4_rot2_FF_pasture_readin, "agbiom")
C4_rot2_FF_grazedbiom <- ncvar_get(C4_rot2_FF_pasture_readin, "grazedbiom")
C4_rot2_FF_l3agbiomfrac <- ncvar_get(C4_rot2_FF_pasture_readin, "l3agbiomfrac")
# Annual
C4_rot2_FF_npp_readin <- nc_open("FF-C4-rot2-npp.nc")
C4_rot2_FF_anpptot <- ncvar_get(C4_rot2_FF_npp_readin, "anpptot")
C4_rot2_FF_npptot <- ncvar_get(C4_rot2_FF_npp_readin, "npptot")
C4_rot2_FF_npp <- ncvar_get(C4_rot2_FF_npp_readin, "npp")
## Continuous
# Daily
C4_cont_FF_biom_readin <- nc_open("FF-C4-cont-biomass.nc")
C4_cont_FF_cbiol <- ncvar_get(C4_cont_FF_biom_readin, "cbiol")
C4_cont_FF_cbios <- ncvar_get(C4_cont_FF_biom_readin, "cbios")
C4_cont_FF_cbiog <- ncvar_get(C4_cont_FF_biom_readin, "cbiog")
C4_cont_FF_cbior <- ncvar_get(C4_cont_FF_biom_readin, "cbior")
C4_cont_FF_biomass <- ncvar_get(C4_cont_FF_biom_readin, "biomass")
C4_cont_FF_plai_readin <- nc_open("FF-C4-cont-plai.nc")
C4_cont_FF_plai <- ncvar_get(C4_cont_FF_plai_readin, "plai")
# No PFT
C4_cont_FF_pasture_readin <- nc_open("FF-C4-cont-pasture.nc")
C4_cont_FF_agbiom <- ncvar_get(C4_cont_FF_pasture_readin, "agbiom")
C4_cont_FF_grazedbiom <- ncvar_get(C4_cont_FF_pasture_readin, "grazedbiom")
C4_cont_FF_l3agbiomfrac <- ncvar_get(C4_cont_FF_pasture_readin, "l3agbiomfrac")
# Annual
C4_cont_FF_npp_readin <- nc_open("FF-C4-cont-npp.nc")
C4_cont_FF_anpptot <- ncvar_get(C4_cont_FF_npp_readin, "anpptot")
C4_cont_FF_npptot <- ncvar_get(C4_cont_FF_npp_readin, "npptot")
C4_cont_FF_npp <- ncvar_get(C4_cont_FF_npp_readin, "npp")
```

```{r}
##### Creating new dataframes

#### Arlington
### Mixed
## Ungrazed
# Daily
mix_ung_ARL_daily_C4_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C4 Grass",biomass=mix_ung_ARL_biomass[11,],cbiol=mix_ung_ARL_cbiol[11,],
                                        cbios=mix_ung_ARL_cbios[11,],cbiog=mix_ung_ARL_cbiog[11,],cbior=mix_ung_ARL_cbior[11,],
                                        plai=mix_ung_ARL_plai[11,],SimulationType="Both grasses allowed",Management="Ungrazed",
                                        Location="ARL",Lat=43.0318,Lon=-89.3539,agbiom="NA",grazedbiom="NA",l3agbiomfrac="NA")
mix_ung_ARL_daily_C3_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C3 Grass",biomass=mix_ung_ARL_biomass[12,],cbiol=mix_ung_ARL_cbiol[12,],
                                        cbios=mix_ung_ARL_cbios[12,],cbiog=mix_ung_ARL_cbiog[12,],cbior=mix_ung_ARL_cbior[12,],
                                        plai=mix_ung_ARL_plai[12,],SimulationType="Both grasses allowed",Management="Ungrazed",
                                        Location="ARL",Lat=43.0318,Lon=-89.3539,agbiom="NA",grazedbiom="NA",l3agbiomfrac="NA")
mix_ung_ARL_daily_both_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="Both Grasses",biomass="NA",cbiol="NA",cbios="NA",cbiog="NA",cbior="NA",
                                           plai="NA",SimulationType="Both grasses allowed",Management="Ungrazed",Location="ARL",
                                           Lat=43.0318,Lon=-89.3539,agbiom=mix_ung_ARL_agbiom,grazedbiom=mix_ung_ARL_grazedbiom,
                                           l3agbiomfrac=mix_ung_ARL_l3agbiomfrac)
mix_ung_ARL_daily_all_df <- rbind(mix_ung_ARL_daily_C4_df,mix_ung_ARL_daily_C3_df,mix_ung_ARL_daily_both_df)
# Annual
mix_ung_ARL_yearly_all_df <- data.frame(year=year,anpptot=mix_ung_ARL_anpptot,npptot=mix_ung_ARL_npptot,C4_npp=mix_ung_ARL_npp[11,],
                                       C3_npp = mix_ung_ARL_npp[12,],SimulationType="Both grasses allowed",Management="Ungrazed",
                                       Location="ARL",Lat=43.0318,Lon=-89.3539)
### C3 Only
## Ungrazed
# Daily
C3_ung_ARL_daily_all_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C3 Grass",biomass=C3_ung_ARL_biomass[12,],cbiol=C3_ung_ARL_cbiol[12,],
                                        cbios=C3_ung_ARL_cbios[12,],cbiog=C3_ung_ARL_cbiog[12,],cbior=C3_ung_ARL_cbior[12,],
                                        plai=C3_ung_ARL_plai[12,],SimulationType="Only C3 grass allowed",Management="Ungrazed",
                                        Location="ARL",Lat=43.0318,Lon=-89.3539,agbiom=C3_ung_ARL_agbiom,grazedbiom=C3_ung_ARL_grazedbiom,
                                        l3agbiomfrac=C3_ung_ARL_l3agbiomfrac)
# Annual
C3_ung_ARL_yearly_all_df <- data.frame(year=year,anpptot=C3_ung_ARL_anpptot,npptot=C3_ung_ARL_npptot,C4_npp=C3_ung_ARL_npp[11,],
                                       C3_npp = C3_ung_ARL_npp[12,],SimulationType="Only C3 grass allowed",Management="Ungrazed",
                                       Location="ARL",Lat=43.0318,Lon=-89.3539)
### C4 Only
## Ungrazed
# Daily
C4_ung_ARL_daily_all_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C4 Grass",biomass=C4_ung_ARL_biomass[11,],cbiol=C4_ung_ARL_cbiol[11,],
                                        cbios=C4_ung_ARL_cbios[11,],cbiog=C4_ung_ARL_cbiog[11,],cbior=C4_ung_ARL_cbior[11,],
                                        plai=C4_ung_ARL_plai[11,],SimulationType="Only C4 grass allowed",Management="Ungrazed",
                                        Location="ARL",Lat=43.0318,Lon=-89.3539,agbiom=C4_ung_ARL_agbiom,grazedbiom=C4_ung_ARL_grazedbiom,
                                        l3agbiomfrac=C4_ung_ARL_l3agbiomfrac)
# Annual
C4_ung_ARL_yearly_all_df <- data.frame(year=year,anpptot=C4_ung_ARL_anpptot,npptot=C4_ung_ARL_npptot,C4_npp=C4_ung_ARL_npp[11,],
                                       C3_npp = C4_ung_ARL_npp[12,],SimulationType="Only C4 grass allowed",Management="Ungrazed",
                                       Location="ARL",Lat=43.0318,Lon=-89.3539)
# Combining all Arlington runs
ARL_daily <- rbind(mix_ung_ARL_daily_all_df,C3_ung_ARL_daily_all_df,C4_ung_ARL_daily_all_df)
ARL_yearly <- rbind(mix_ung_ARL_yearly_all_df,C3_ung_ARL_yearly_all_df,C4_ung_ARL_yearly_all_df)


#### Bison Ridge Ranch runs
### Mixed
## Ungrazed
# Daily
mix_ung_BR_daily_C4_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C4 Grass",biomass=mix_ung_BR_biomass[11,],cbiol=mix_ung_BR_cbiol[11,],
                                        cbios=mix_ung_BR_cbios[11,],cbiog=mix_ung_BR_cbiog[11,],cbior=mix_ung_BR_cbior[11,],
                                        plai=mix_ung_BR_plai[11,],SimulationType="Both grasses allowed",Management="Ungrazed",
                                        Location="BR",Lat=43.7385,Lon=-89.4472,agbiom="NA",grazedbiom="NA",l3agbiomfrac="NA")
mix_ung_BR_daily_C3_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C3 Grass",biomass=mix_ung_BR_biomass[12,],cbiol=mix_ung_BR_cbiol[12,],
                                        cbios=mix_ung_BR_cbios[12,],cbiog=mix_ung_BR_cbiog[12,],cbior=mix_ung_BR_cbior[12,],
                                        plai=mix_ung_BR_plai[12,],SimulationType="Both grasses allowed",Management="Ungrazed",
                                        Location="BR",Lat=43.7385,Lon=-89.4472,agbiom="NA",grazedbiom="NA",l3agbiomfrac="NA")
mix_ung_BR_daily_both_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="Both Grasses",biomass="NA",cbiol="NA",cbios="NA",cbiog="NA",cbior="NA",
                                           plai="NA",SimulationType="Both grasses allowed",Management="Ungrazed",Location="BR",
                                           Lat=43.7385,Lon=-89.4472,agbiom=mix_ung_BR_agbiom,grazedbiom=mix_ung_BR_grazedbiom,
                                           l3agbiomfrac=mix_ung_BR_l3agbiomfrac)
mix_ung_BR_daily_all_df <- rbind(mix_ung_BR_daily_C4_df,mix_ung_BR_daily_C3_df,mix_ung_BR_daily_both_df)
# Annual
mix_ung_BR_yearly_all_df <- data.frame(year=year,anpptot=mix_ung_BR_anpptot,npptot=mix_ung_BR_npptot,C4_npp=mix_ung_BR_npp[11,],
                                       C3_npp = mix_ung_BR_npp[12,],SimulationType="Both grasses allowed",Management="Ungrazed",
                                       Location="BR",Lat=43.7385,Lon=-89.4472)
### C3 Only
## Ungrazed
# Daily
C3_ung_BR_daily_all_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C3 Grass",biomass=C3_ung_BR_biomass[12,],cbiol=C3_ung_BR_cbiol[12,],
                                        cbios=C3_ung_BR_cbios[12,],cbiog=C3_ung_BR_cbiog[12,],cbior=C3_ung_BR_cbior[12,],
                                        plai=C3_ung_BR_plai[12,],SimulationType="Only C3 grass allowed",Management="Ungrazed",
                                        Location="BR",Lat=43.7385,Lon=-89.4472,agbiom=C3_ung_BR_agbiom,grazedbiom=C3_ung_BR_grazedbiom,
                                        l3agbiomfrac=C3_ung_BR_l3agbiomfrac)
# Annual
C3_ung_BR_yearly_all_df <- data.frame(year=year,anpptot=C3_ung_BR_anpptot,npptot=C3_ung_BR_npptot,C4_npp=C3_ung_BR_npp[11,],
                                       C3_npp = C3_ung_BR_npp[12,],SimulationType="Only C3 grass allowed",Management="Ungrazed",
                                       Location="BR",Lat=43.7385,Lon=-89.4472)
### C4 Only
## Ungrazed
# Daily
C4_ung_BR_daily_all_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C4 Grass",biomass=C4_ung_BR_biomass[11,],cbiol=C4_ung_BR_cbiol[11,],
                                        cbios=C4_ung_BR_cbios[11,],cbiog=C4_ung_BR_cbiog[11,],cbior=C4_ung_BR_cbior[11,],
                                        plai=C4_ung_BR_plai[11,],SimulationType="Only C4 grass allowed",Management="Ungrazed",
                                        Location="BR",Lat=43.7385,Lon=-89.4472,agbiom=C4_ung_BR_agbiom,grazedbiom=C4_ung_BR_grazedbiom,
                                        l3agbiomfrac=C4_ung_BR_l3agbiomfrac)
# Annual
C4_ung_BR_yearly_all_df <- data.frame(year=year,anpptot=C4_ung_BR_anpptot,npptot=C4_ung_BR_npptot,C4_npp=C4_ung_BR_npp[11,],
                                       C3_npp = C4_ung_BR_npp[12,],SimulationType="Only C4 grass allowed",Management="Ungrazed",
                                       Location="BR",Lat=43.7385,Lon=-89.4472)
# Combining all BR ranch runs
BR_daily <- rbind(mix_ung_BR_daily_all_df,C3_ung_BR_daily_all_df,C4_ung_BR_daily_all_df)
BR_yearly <- rbind(mix_ung_BR_yearly_all_df,C3_ung_BR_yearly_all_df,C4_ung_BR_yearly_all_df)


#### Franbrook Farm runs
### Mixed
## Ungrazed
# Daily
mix_ung_FF_daily_C4_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C4 Grass",biomass=mix_ung_FF_biomass[11,],cbiol=mix_ung_FF_cbiol[11,],
                                        cbios=mix_ung_FF_cbios[11,],cbiog=mix_ung_FF_cbiog[11,],cbior=mix_ung_FF_cbior[11,],
                                        plai=mix_ung_FF_plai[11,],SimulationType="Both grasses allowed",Management="Ungrazed",
                                        Location="FF",Lat=42.73796,Lon=-89.75369,agbiom="NA",grazedbiom="NA",l3agbiomfrac="NA")
mix_ung_FF_daily_C3_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C3 Grass",biomass=mix_ung_FF_biomass[12,],cbiol=mix_ung_FF_cbiol[12,],
                                        cbios=mix_ung_FF_cbios[12,],cbiog=mix_ung_FF_cbiog[12,],cbior=mix_ung_FF_cbior[12,],
                                        plai=mix_ung_FF_plai[12,],SimulationType="Both grasses allowed",Management="Ungrazed",
                                        Location="FF",Lat=42.73796,Lon=-89.75369,agbiom="NA",grazedbiom="NA",l3agbiomfrac="NA")
mix_ung_FF_daily_both_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="Both Grasses",biomass="NA",cbiol="NA",cbios="NA",cbiog="NA",cbior="NA",
                                           plai="NA",SimulationType="Both grasses allowed",Management="Ungrazed",Location="FF",
                                           Lat=42.73796,Lon=-89.75369,agbiom=mix_ung_FF_agbiom,grazedbiom=mix_ung_FF_grazedbiom,
                                           l3agbiomfrac=mix_ung_FF_l3agbiomfrac)
mix_ung_FF_daily_all_df <- rbind(mix_ung_FF_daily_C4_df,mix_ung_FF_daily_C3_df,mix_ung_FF_daily_both_df)
# Annual
mix_ung_FF_yearly_all_df <- data.frame(year=year,anpptot=mix_ung_FF_anpptot,npptot=mix_ung_FF_npptot,C4_npp=mix_ung_FF_npp[11,],
                                       C3_npp = mix_ung_FF_npp[12,],SimulationType="Both grasses allowed",Management="Ungrazed",
                                       Location="FF",Lat=42.73796,Lon=-89.75369)
## 2-Day Rotation
# Daily
mix_rot2_FF_daily_C4_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C4 Grass",biomass=mix_rot2_FF_biomass[11,],cbiol=mix_rot2_FF_cbiol[11,],
                                        cbios=mix_rot2_FF_cbios[11,],cbiog=mix_rot2_FF_cbiog[11,],cbior=mix_rot2_FF_cbior[11,],
                                        plai=mix_rot2_FF_plai[11,],SimulationType="Both grasses allowed",Management="2-Day Rotation",
                                        Location="FF",Lat=42.73796,Lon=-89.75369,agbiom="NA",grazedbiom="NA",l3agbiomfrac="NA")
mix_rot2_FF_daily_C3_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C3 Grass",biomass=mix_rot2_FF_biomass[12,],cbiol=mix_rot2_FF_cbiol[12,],
                                        cbios=mix_rot2_FF_cbios[12,],cbiog=mix_rot2_FF_cbiog[12,],cbior=mix_rot2_FF_cbior[12,],
                                        plai=mix_rot2_FF_plai[12,],SimulationType="Both grasses allowed",Management="2-Day Rotation",
                                        Location="FF",Lat=42.73796,Lon=-89.75369,agbiom="NA",grazedbiom="NA",l3agbiomfrac="NA")
mix_rot2_FF_daily_both_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="Both Grasses",biomass="NA",cbiol="NA",cbios="NA",cbiog="NA",cbior="NA",
                                           plai="NA",SimulationType="Both grasses allowed",Management="2-Day Rotation",Location="FF",
                                           Lat=42.73796,Lon=-89.75369,agbiom=mix_rot2_FF_agbiom,grazedbiom=mix_rot2_FF_grazedbiom,
                                           l3agbiomfrac=mix_rot2_FF_l3agbiomfrac)
mix_rot2_FF_daily_all_df <- rbind(mix_rot2_FF_daily_C4_df,mix_rot2_FF_daily_C3_df,mix_rot2_FF_daily_both_df)
# Annual
mix_rot2_FF_yearly_all_df <- data.frame(year=year,anpptot=mix_rot2_FF_anpptot,npptot=mix_rot2_FF_npptot,C4_npp=mix_rot2_FF_npp[11,],
                                       C3_npp = mix_rot2_FF_npp[12,],SimulationType="Both grasses allowed",Management="2-Day Rotation",
                                       Location="FF",Lat=42.73796,Lon=-89.75369)
## Continuous Grazing
# Daily
mix_cont_FF_daily_C4_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C4 Grass",biomass=mix_cont_FF_biomass[11,],cbiol=mix_cont_FF_cbiol[11,],
                                        cbios=mix_cont_FF_cbios[11,],cbiog=mix_cont_FF_cbiog[11,],cbior=mix_cont_FF_cbior[11,],
                                        plai=mix_cont_FF_plai[11,],SimulationType="Both grasses allowed",Management="Continuous Grazing",
                                        Location="FF",Lat=42.73796,Lon=-89.75369,agbiom="NA",grazedbiom="NA",l3agbiomfrac="NA")
mix_cont_FF_daily_C3_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C3 Grass",biomass=mix_cont_FF_biomass[12,],cbiol=mix_cont_FF_cbiol[12,],
                                        cbios=mix_cont_FF_cbios[12,],cbiog=mix_cont_FF_cbiog[12,],cbior=mix_cont_FF_cbior[12,],
                                        plai=mix_cont_FF_plai[12,],SimulationType="Both grasses allowed",Management="Continuous Grazing",
                                        Location="FF",Lat=42.73796,Lon=-89.75369,agbiom="NA",grazedbiom="NA",l3agbiomfrac="NA")
mix_cont_FF_daily_both_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="Both Grasses",biomass="NA",cbiol="NA",cbios="NA",cbiog="NA",cbior="NA",
                                           plai="NA",SimulationType="Both grasses allowed",Management="Continuous Grazing",Location="FF",
                                           Lat=42.73796,Lon=-89.75369,agbiom=mix_cont_FF_agbiom,grazedbiom=mix_cont_FF_grazedbiom,
                                           l3agbiomfrac=mix_cont_FF_l3agbiomfrac)

mix_cont_FF_daily_all_df <- rbind(mix_cont_FF_daily_C4_df,mix_cont_FF_daily_C3_df,mix_cont_FF_daily_both_df)
# Annual
mix_cont_FF_yearly_all_df <- data.frame(year=year,anpptot=mix_cont_FF_anpptot,npptot=mix_cont_FF_npptot,C4_npp=mix_cont_FF_npp[11,],
                                       C3_npp = mix_cont_FF_npp[12,],SimulationType="Both grasses allowed",Management="Continuous Grazing",
                                       Location="FF",Lat=42.73796,Lon=-89.75369)

### C3 Only
## Ungrazed
# Daily
C3_ung_FF_daily_all_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C3 Grass",biomass=C3_ung_FF_biomass[12,],cbiol=C3_ung_FF_cbiol[12,],
                                        cbios=C3_ung_FF_cbios[12,],cbiog=C3_ung_FF_cbiog[12,],cbior=C3_ung_FF_cbior[12,],
                                        plai=C3_ung_FF_plai[12,],SimulationType="Only C3 grass allowed",Management="Ungrazed",
                                        Location="FF",Lat=42.73796,Lon=-89.75369,agbiom=C3_ung_FF_agbiom,grazedbiom=C3_ung_FF_grazedbiom,
                                        l3agbiomfrac=C3_ung_FF_l3agbiomfrac)
# Annual
C3_ung_FF_yearly_all_df <- data.frame(year=year,anpptot=C3_ung_FF_anpptot,npptot=C3_ung_FF_npptot,C4_npp=C3_ung_FF_npp[11,],
                                       C3_npp = C3_ung_FF_npp[12,],SimulationType="Only C3 grass allowed",Management="Ungrazed",
                                       Location="FF",Lat=42.73796,Lon=-89.75369)
## 2-Day Rotation
# Daily
C3_rot2_FF_daily_all_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C3 Grass",biomass=C3_rot2_FF_biomass[12,],cbiol=C3_rot2_FF_cbiol[12,],
                                        cbios=C3_rot2_FF_cbios[12,],cbiog=C3_rot2_FF_cbiog[12,],cbior=C3_rot2_FF_cbior[12,],
                                        plai=C3_rot2_FF_plai[12,],SimulationType="Only C3 grass allowed",Management="2-Day Rotation",
                                        Location="FF",Lat=42.73796,Lon=-89.75369,agbiom=C3_rot2_FF_agbiom,grazedbiom=C3_rot2_FF_grazedbiom,
                                        l3agbiomfrac=C3_rot2_FF_l3agbiomfrac)
# Annual
C3_rot2_FF_yearly_all_df <- data.frame(year=year,anpptot=C3_rot2_FF_anpptot,npptot=C3_rot2_FF_npptot,C4_npp=C3_rot2_FF_npp[11,],
                                       C3_npp = C3_rot2_FF_npp[12,],SimulationType="Only C3 grass allowed",Management="2-Day Rotation",
                                       Location="FF",Lat=42.73796,Lon=-89.75369)
## Continuous
C3_cont_FF_daily_all_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C3 Grass",biomass=C3_cont_FF_biomass[12,],cbiol=C3_cont_FF_cbiol[12,],
                                        cbios=C3_cont_FF_cbios[12,],cbiog=C3_cont_FF_cbiog[12,],cbior=C3_cont_FF_cbior[12,],
                                        plai=C3_cont_FF_plai[12,],SimulationType="Only C3 grass allowed",Management="Continuous Grazing",
                                        Location="FF",Lat=42.73796,Lon=-89.75369,agbiom=C3_cont_FF_agbiom,grazedbiom=C3_cont_FF_grazedbiom,
                                        l3agbiomfrac=C3_cont_FF_l3agbiomfrac)
# Annual
C3_cont_FF_yearly_all_df <- data.frame(year=year,anpptot=C3_cont_FF_anpptot,npptot=C3_cont_FF_npptot,C4_npp=C3_cont_FF_npp[11,],
                                       C3_npp = C3_cont_FF_npp[12,],SimulationType="Only C3 grass allowed",Management="Continuous Grazing",
                                       Location="FF",Lat=42.73796,Lon=-89.75369)
### C4 Only
## Ungrazed
# Daily
C4_ung_FF_daily_all_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C4 Grass",biomass=C4_ung_FF_biomass[11,],cbiol=C4_ung_FF_cbiol[11,],
                                        cbios=C4_ung_FF_cbios[11,],cbiog=C4_ung_FF_cbiog[11,],cbior=C4_ung_FF_cbior[11,],
                                        plai=C4_ung_FF_plai[11,],SimulationType="Only C4 grass allowed",Management="Ungrazed",
                                        Location="FF",Lat=42.73796,Lon=-89.75369,agbiom=C4_ung_FF_agbiom,grazedbiom=C4_ung_FF_grazedbiom,
                                        l3agbiomfrac=C4_ung_FF_l3agbiomfrac)
# Annual
C4_ung_FF_yearly_all_df <- data.frame(year=year,anpptot=C4_ung_FF_anpptot,npptot=C4_ung_FF_npptot,C4_npp=C4_ung_FF_npp[11,],
                                       C3_npp = C4_ung_FF_npp[12,],SimulationType="Only C4 grass allowed",Management="Ungrazed",
                                       Location="FF",Lat=42.73796,Lon=-89.75369)
## 2-Day Rotation
# Daily
C4_rot2_FF_daily_all_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C4 Grass",biomass=C4_rot2_FF_biomass[11,],cbiol=C4_rot2_FF_cbiol[11,],
                                        cbios=C4_rot2_FF_cbios[11,],cbiog=C4_rot2_FF_cbiog[11,],cbior=C4_rot2_FF_cbior[11,],
                                        plai=C4_rot2_FF_plai[11,],SimulationType="Only C4 grass allowed",Management="2-Day Rotation",
                                        Location="FF",Lat=42.73796,Lon=-89.75369,agbiom=C4_rot2_FF_agbiom,grazedbiom=C4_rot2_FF_grazedbiom,
                                        l3agbiomfrac=C4_rot2_FF_l3agbiomfrac)
# Annual
C4_rot2_FF_yearly_all_df <- data.frame(year=year,anpptot=C4_rot2_FF_anpptot,npptot=C4_rot2_FF_npptot,C4_npp=C4_rot2_FF_npp[11,],
                                       C3_npp = C4_rot2_FF_npp[12,],SimulationType="Only C4 grass allowed",Management="2-Day Rotation",
                                       Location="FF",Lat=42.73796,Lon=-89.75369)
## Continuous Grazing
C4_cont_FF_daily_all_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C4 Grass",biomass=C4_cont_FF_biomass[11,],cbiol=C4_cont_FF_cbiol[11,],
                                        cbios=C4_cont_FF_cbios[11,],cbiog=C4_cont_FF_cbiog[11,],cbior=C4_cont_FF_cbior[11,],
                                        plai=C4_cont_FF_plai[11,],SimulationType="Only C4 grass allowed",Management="Continuous Grazing",
                                        Location="FF",Lat=42.73796,Lon=-89.75369,agbiom=C4_cont_FF_agbiom,grazedbiom=C4_cont_FF_grazedbiom,
                                        l3agbiomfrac=C4_cont_FF_l3agbiomfrac)
# Annual
C4_cont_FF_yearly_all_df <- data.frame(year=year,anpptot=C4_cont_FF_anpptot,npptot=C4_cont_FF_npptot,C4_npp=C4_cont_FF_npp[11,],
                                       C3_npp = C4_cont_FF_npp[12,],SimulationType="Only C4 grass allowed",Management="Continuous Grazing",
                                       Location="FF",Lat=42.73796,Lon=-89.75369)
# Combining all Franbrook Farm runs
FF_daily <- rbind(mix_ung_FF_daily_all_df,mix_rot2_FF_daily_all_df,mix_cont_FF_daily_all_df,
                  C3_ung_FF_daily_all_df,C3_rot2_FF_daily_all_df,C3_cont_FF_daily_all_df,
                  C4_ung_FF_daily_all_df,C4_rot2_FF_daily_all_df,C4_cont_FF_daily_all_df)
FF_yearly <- rbind(mix_ung_FF_yearly_all_df,mix_rot2_FF_yearly_all_df,mix_cont_FF_yearly_all_df,
                  C3_ung_FF_yearly_all_df,C3_rot2_FF_yearly_all_df,C3_cont_FF_yearly_all_df,
                  C4_ung_FF_yearly_all_df,C4_rot2_FF_yearly_all_df,C4_cont_FF_yearly_all_df)


ARL_BR_FF_daily <- rbind(ARL_daily,BR_daily,FF_daily)
write.csv(ARL_BR_FF_daily, "/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/ARL_BR_FF_daily.csv", row.names=FALSE)
ARL_BR_FF_yearly <- rbind(ARL_yearly,BR_yearly,FF_yearly)
write.csv(ARL_BR_FF_yearly, "/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/ARL_BR_FF_yearly.csv", row.names=FALSE)
```

```{r}
###### Graphing

##### Setting working directory
setwd("/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis")

# Reading in cleaned dataframes
ARL_BR_FF_daily <- read_csv("ARL_BR_FF_daily.csv")
ARL_BR_FF_yearly <- read_csv("ARL_BR_FF_yearly.csv")

# Graph of different biomass pools
ARL_biomass_pools <- ARL_BR_FF_daily %>%
  mutate(Leaf = cbiol/biomass) %>%
  mutate(Stem = cbios/biomass) %>%
  mutate(Reproductive = cbiog/biomass) %>%
  mutate(Root = cbior/biomass) %>%
  filter(Location == "ARL") %>%
  filter(Date >= '2021-01-01') %>%
  filter(PFT != "Both Grasses") %>%
  dplyr::select(Leaf,Stem,Reproductive,Root,PFT,SimulationType,Date) %>%
  melt(value.name='Ratio', id=c('PFT','SimulationType','Date')) %>%
  rename(Pool = variable)
ARL_biomass_pools_C3 <- ARL_biomass_pools %>%
  filter(PFT == "C3 Grass") %>%
  filter(SimulationType != "Only C4 grass allowed")
ARL_biomass_pools_C4 <- ARL_biomass_pools %>%
  filter(PFT == "C4 Grass") %>%
  filter(SimulationType != "Only C3 grass allowed")
ARL_biomass_pools <- rbind(ARL_biomass_pools_C3, ARL_biomass_pools_C4)
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/Biomass_Partitioning_ARL_Graph.tiff", units="in", height=5, width=10, res=300)
ggplot(data=ARL_biomass_pools, aes(x=Date,y=Ratio)) + geom_line(aes(col=Pool)) +
  xlab("Date") + ggtitle("Biomass Partitioning at Arlington in 2021") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=90, vjust=0.5)) +
  ylab("Ratio of Biomass Pool to Total Biomass (kg/m2)") + facet_wrap(~PFT+SimulationType)

# Graph of C3 ratio over time for ungrazed at ARL and BR
ARL_BR_bothgrass_df <- ARL_BR_FF_daily %>%
  filter(Location != "FF") %>%
  filter(PFT == "Both Grasses") %>%
  filter(Date >= '1979-01-01') %>%
  filter(l3agbiomfrac != "NaN")
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/C3_Ratio_Graph_Ungrazed.tiff", units="in", height=6, width=8, res=300)
ggplot(data=ARL_BR_bothgrass_df, aes(x=Date,y=l3agbiomfrac)) + geom_line(aes(col=Location)) +
  ggtitle("Simulated Ratio of C3 ANPP to Total ANPP in Ungrazed Mixed Grasslands") +
  ylab("Ratio of C3 ANPP to Total ANPP") + xlab("Year") + theme(plot.title=element_text(size=15),
  axis.text=element_text(size=10),axis.title=element_text(size=12))

# Graphs of LAI across different grazing management regimes at FF
FF_biomass_C3_C4 <- ARL_BR_FF_daily %>%
  filter(Location == "FF") %>%
  filter(Date >= '2021-01-01') %>%
  filter(PFT != "Both Grasses") %>%
  filter(SimulationType == "Both grasses allowed")
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/LAI_Grazing_FF_Graph_Mixed.tiff", units="in", height=5, width=9, res=300)
ggplot(data=FF_biomass_C3_C4,aes(x=Date,y=plai)) + geom_line(aes(col=PFT)) +
  ggtitle("Daily Leaf Area Index by Management at Franbrook Farm in 2021 - Mixed Grassland") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=90, vjust=0.5)) +
  ylab("Daily Leaf Area Index (m2/m2)") + xlab("Date") + facet_wrap(~Management)
FF_biomass_C3 <- ARL_BR_FF_daily %>%
  filter(Location == "FF") %>%
  filter(Date >= '2021-01-01') %>%
  filter(PFT == "C3 Grass") %>%
  filter(SimulationType == "Only C3 grass allowed")
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/LAI_Grazing_FF_Graph_C3.tiff", units="in", height=5, width=9, res=300)
ggplot(data=FF_biomass_C3,aes(x=Date,y=plai)) + geom_line(aes(col=PFT)) +
  ggtitle("Daily Leaf Area Index by Management at Franbrook Farm in 2021 - C3 Only") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=90, vjust=0.5)) +
  ylab("Daily Leaf Area Index (m2/m2)") + xlab("Date") + facet_wrap(~Management)
FF_biomass_C4 <- ARL_BR_FF_daily %>%
  filter(Location == "FF") %>%
  filter(Date >= '2021-01-01') %>%
  filter(PFT == "C4 Grass") %>%
  filter(SimulationType == "Only C4 grass allowed")
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/LAI_Grazing_FF_Graph_C4.tiff", units="in", height=5, width=9, res=300)
ggplot(data=FF_biomass_C4,aes(x=Date,y=plai)) + geom_line(aes(col=PFT)) +
  ggtitle("Daily Leaf Area Index by Management at Franbrook Farm in 2021 - C4 Only") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=90, vjust=0.5)) +
  ylab("Daily Leaf Area Index (m2/m2)") + xlab("Date") + facet_wrap(~Management)

# Graph of yearly NPP comparisons for different grass types
ARL_BR_FF_yearly_NPP <- ARL_BR_FF_yearly %>%
  filter(Year >= 1979) %>%
  filter(Location == "FF")
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/NPPtot_Grazing_FF_Graph.tiff", units="in", height=5, width=10, res=300)
ggplot(data=ARL_BR_FF_yearly, aes(x=Year,y=npptot)) + geom_line(aes(col=Management)) +
  ggtitle("Simulated Total Net Primary Productivity Across Management and Grass Type at Franbrook Farm") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=90, vjust=0.5)) +
  ylab("Total Net Primary Productivity (kg/m2)") + facet_wrap(~SimulationType)

# Graph of C3 ratio over time for grazing at FF
FF_daily_both <- ARL_BR_FF_daily %>%
  filter(Date >= '1979-01-01') %>%
  filter(Location == "FF") %>%
  filter(PFT == "Both Grasses") %>%
  filter(l3agbiomfrac != "NaN")
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/C3_Ratio_Graph_Grazing.tiff", units="in", height=6, width=10, res=300)
ggplot(data=FF_daily_both, aes(x=Date,y=l3agbiomfrac)) + geom_line(aes(col=Management)) +
  ggtitle("Simulated Ratio of C3 ANPP to Total ANPP across Grass Management at Franbrook Farm") +
  ylab("Ratio of C3 ANPP to Total NPP") + xlab("Year") + theme(plot.title=element_text(size=15),
  axis.text=element_text(size=10),axis.title=element_text(size=12)) + facet_wrap(~Management) + theme(legend.position="none")
view(FF_daily_both)
```

```{r}
###### Validation

##### Setting working directory
setwd("/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis")


##### Reading in cleaned dataframes
ARL_BR_FF_daily <- read_csv("ARL_BR_FF_daily.csv")
ARL_BR_FF_yearly <- read_csv("ARL_BR_FF_yearly.csv")
# Reading in validation dataframes
ARL_BR_val <- read_csv("Kummel_ARL_BR_ANPP 07_08 data.csv")
FF_val <- read_csv("Oates_FF_NPP 06_07 data.csv", skip=5)


##### Creating standard error function
calcSE<-function(x){
  x <- x[is.na(x)==F]
  sd(x)/sqrt(length(x))
}


##### Subsetting data
### Arlington and BR Ranch
# Simulation data
ARL_BR_daily <- ARL_BR_FF_daily %>%
  filter(Location != "FF") %>%
  filter(Date >= '2007-01-01' & Date <= '2009-01-01') %>%
  dplyr::select(Date,PFT,SimulationType,Location,agbiom,l3agbiomfrac)
ARL_BR_daily_C3 <- ARL_BR_daily %>%
  filter(PFT == "C3 Grass") %>%
  filter(SimulationType != "Only C4 grass allowed")
ARL_BR_daily_C4 <- ARL_BR_daily %>%
  filter(PFT == "C4 Grass") %>%
  filter(SimulationType != "Only C3 grass allowed")
ARL_BR_daily_both <- ARL_BR_daily %>%
  filter(PFT == "Both Grasses")
ARL_BR_daily <- rbind(ARL_BR_daily_C3, ARL_BR_daily_C4, ARL_BR_daily_both)
ARL_BR_daily <- ARL_BR_daily %>%
  filter(agbiom != "NA") %>%
  mutate(agbiom = agbiom/(1-0.45)) %>% # Converting from kg C m2 yr-1 to kg m2 yr-1
  rename(anpp_kg_m2 = agbiom)
ARL_BR_daily_both <- ARL_BR_daily %>%
  filter(SimulationType == "Both grasses allowed") %>%
  dplyr::select(-PFT,-SimulationType) %>%
  filter(l3agbiomfrac != "NaN")
ARL_BR_daily_C3 <- ARL_BR_daily %>%
  filter(SimulationType == "Only C3 grass allowed") %>%
  dplyr::select(-PFT,-SimulationType) %>%
  filter(l3agbiomfrac != "NaN")
ARL_BR_daily_C4 <- ARL_BR_daily %>%
  filter(SimulationType == "Only C4 grass allowed") %>%
  dplyr::select(-PFT,-SimulationType) %>%
  filter(l3agbiomfrac != "NaN")
view(ARL_BR_daily_C3)
view(ARL_BR_daily_C4)
view(ARL_BR_daily_both)

# Validation data
ARL_BR_val_recoded <- ARL_BR_val %>%
  mutate(l3agbiomfrac = (proportionCSgrass / (proportionCSgrass + proportionWSgrass))) %>%
  mutate(Date = case_when(
    Notes == "June-October Harvest Timing" ~ "2007-10-01",
    Notes == "warm season= indian grass/big blue stem, May -August Harvest Duration" ~ "2007-08-01",
    Notes == "Late May- Late October Harvest Timing" ~ "2008-10-21",
    Notes == "June-November Harvest Duration" ~ "2008-11-01")) %>%
  mutate(Date = as.Date(Date)) %>%
  mutate(Location = case_when(
    City == "Arlington, WI" ~ "ARL",
    City == "BR Ranch" ~ "BR")) %>%
  mutate(Year = as.factor(Year)) %>%
  dplyr::select(Date,Year,Location,anpp_kg_m2_yr,l3agbiomfrac)
ARL_BR_val_recoded_C3 <- ARL_BR_val_recoded %>%
  filter(l3agbiomfrac >= 0.9)
ARL_BR_val_recoded_C4 <- ARL_BR_val_recoded %>%
  filter(l3agbiomfrac <= 0.1)


### Franbrook Farm
# Simulation data
FF_daily_C3 <- ARL_BR_FF_daily %>%
  filter(Location == "FF") %>%
  filter(Date >= '2006-01-01' & Date <= '2008-01-01') %>%
  dplyr::select(Date,Location,PFT,SimulationType,Management,plai,agbiom,grazedbiom,l3agbiomfrac) %>%
  filter(agbiom != "NA") %>%
  filter(l3agbiomfrac != "NaN") %>%
  filter(SimulationType == "Only C3 grass allowed") %>%
  filter(plai > 0) %>%
  mutate(agbiom = agbiom/0.45) # Converting from kg C m2 yr-1 to kg m2 yr-1
FF_daily_C3_ung <- FF_daily_C3 %>%
  filter(Management == "Ungrazed")
FF_daily_C3_rot2 <- FF_daily_C3 %>%
  filter(Management == "2-Day Rotation")
FF_daily_C3_cont <- FF_daily_C3 %>%
  filter(Management == "Continuous Grazing")

FF_daily_C3 
  
view(FF_daily_C3_cont)
# Validation data
view(FF_val_recoded)
FF_val_recoded <- FF_val %>%
  mutate(agbiom = g.m2 / 1000)
FF_val_recoded_ung <- FF_val_recoded %>%
  filter(treatment == "NONE") %>%
  mutate(treatment = recode(treatment, "NONE" = "Ungrazed")) %>%
  group_by(date) %>%
  mutate(mean_agbiom = mean(agbiom)) %>%
  mutate(SE_agbiom = calcSE(agbiom)) %>%
  mutate(mean_lai = mean(`final LAI`)) %>%
  mutate(SE_lai = calcSE(`final LAI`))
FF_val_recoded_rot2 <- FF_val_recoded %>%
  filter(treatment == "MIRG") %>%
  mutate(treatment = recode(treatment, "MIRG" = "2-Day Rotation")) %>%
  group_by(date) %>%
  mutate(mean_agbiom = mean(agbiom)) %>%
  mutate(SE_agbiom = calcSE(agbiom)) %>%
  mutate(mean_lai = mean(`final LAI`)) %>%
  mutate(SE_lai = calcSE(`final LAI`))
FF_val_recoded_cont <- FF_val_recoded %>%
  filter(treatment == "CONT") %>%
  mutate(treatment = recode(treatment, "CONT" = "Continuous Grazing")) %>%
  group_by(date) %>%
  mutate(mean_agbiom = mean(agbiom)) %>%
  mutate(SE_agbiom = calcSE(agbiom)) %>%
  mutate(mean_lai = mean(`final LAI`)) %>%
  mutate(SE_lai = calcSE(`final LAI`))
FF_val_recoded_recombined <- rbind(FF_val_recoded_ung, FF_val_recoded_rot2, FF_val_recoded_cont)
FF_val_recoded_recombined <- FF_val_recoded_recombined %>%
  distinct(date, treatment, mean_agbiom, SE_agbiom, mean_lai, SE_lai) %>%
  mutate("Simulation/Observed" = "Observed")


##### Validation analyses
#### Arlington and BR Ranch
### Means
ARL_BR_val_recoded <- ARL_BR_val_recoded %>%
  group_by(Year,Location) %>%
  mutate(mean_anpp = mean(anpp_kg_m2_yr)) %>%
  mutate(SE_anpp = calcSE(anpp_kg_m2_yr)) %>%
  mutate(mean_l3agbiomfrac = mean(l3agbiomfrac)) %>%
  mutate(SE_l3agbiomfrac = calcSE(l3agbiomfrac))
view(ARL_BR_val_recoded)
        
### ANPP analyses
# Simulation: Both grasses allowed, Validation: full Kummel data
tdStats(m=ARL_BR_daily_both$anpp_kg_m2, o=ARL_BR_val_recoded$anpp_kg_m2_yr, "mbe") # -0.2034257

# Simulation: Only C3 grasses allowed, Validation: full Kummel data
tdStats(m=ARL_BR_daily_both$anpp_kg_m2, o=ARL_BR_val_recoded_C3$anpp_kg_m2_yr, "mbe") # -0.02235221
# Simulation: Only C3 grasses allowed, Validation: >= 90% C3 grass Kummel data
tdStats(m=ARL_BR_daily_C3$anpp_kg_m2, o=ARL_BR_val_recoded_C3$anpp_kg_m2_yr, "mbe") # -0.0810716
# Simulation: Only C4 grasses allowed, Validation: >= 90% C4 grass Kummel data
tdStats(m=ARL_BR_daily_C4$anpp_kg_m2, o=ARL_BR_val_recoded_C4$anpp_kg_m2_yr, "mbe") # -0.1617621
# Fraction of C3 grass / (C3 and C4 grasses)
# Both grasses, full Kummel data
tdStats(m=ARL_BR_daily_both$l3agbiomfrac, o=ARL_BR_val_recoded$l3agbiomfrac, "mbe") # 0.4223466

#### Franbrook Farm
### LAI graphs
FF_val_recoded_recombined_sim <-
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/Sim_LAI_FF", units="in", height=4, width=7, res=300)
ggplot(FF_daily_C3, aes(x=Date, y=plai)) + geom_line(aes(col=Management)) +
  ylab("Leaf Area Index (m2 m-2)") + ggtitle("Simulated LAI for Franbrook Farm from 2006-2007")
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/Obs_LAI_FF", units="in", height=4, width=7, res=300)
ggplot(FF_val_recoded_recombined, aes(x=date, y=mean_lai)) + geom_line(aes(col=treatment)) + 
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=mean_lai-SE_lai, ymax=mean_lai+SE_lai), width=.2) +
  ylab("Mean Leaf Area Index (m2 m-2)") + xlab("Date") +
  ggtitle("Observed Mean LAI for Franbrook Farm from 2006-2007") + labs(col="Management")
### agbiom graphs
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/Sim_agbiom_FF", units="in", height=4, width=7, res=300)
ggplot(FF_daily_C3, aes(x=Date, y=agbiom)) + geom_line(aes(col=Management)) +
  ylab("Aboveground Biomass (kg m2 yr-1)") + ggtitle("Simulated Aboveground Biomass for Franbrook Farm from 2006-2007")
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/Obs_agbiom_FF", units="in", height=4, width=7, res=300)
ggplot(FF_val_recoded_recombined, aes(x=date, y=mean_agbiom)) + geom_line(aes(col=treatment)) + 
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=mean_agbiom-SE_agbiom, ymax=mean_agbiom+SE_agbiom), width=.2) +
  ylab("Aboveground Biomass (kg m2 yr-1)") + xlab("Date") +
  ggtitle("Observed Aboveground Biomass for Franbrook Farm from 2006-2007") + labs(col="Management")


### ANPP analyses - Simulation: Only C3 grasses allowed
# Management : Ungrazed
tdStats(m=FF_daily_C3_ung$anpp_kg_m2, o=FF_val_recoded_ung$anpp_kg_m2, "mbe") # -0.1849674
#




##### Validation graphs
### Arlington and BR Ranch
# ANPP Graph
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/ANPP_ARL_BR_Validation.tiff", units="in", height=4, width=7, res=300)
ggplot(data=ARL_BR_val_recoded, aes(x=Location, y=anpp_kg_m2_yr)) + geom_boxplot(aes(col=Year)) + ylab("Aboveground Net Primary Productivity (kg m2 yr-1)") + ggtitle("Observed ANPP from 2007-2008 at Arlington and Bison Ridge Ranch") + ylim(0,1.6)
### Franbrook Farm Graph
# ANPP Graph



```

```{r}
setwd("/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis")

##### Creating standard error function
calcSE<-function(x){
  x <- x[is.na(x)==F]
  sd(x)/sqrt(length(x))
}

### TRY data
# Reading in full dataset
try <- rtry_import("TRY database files/23814_orig_allvars.txt")
try <- rtry_remove_dup(try)
try <- rtry_exclude(try, ErrorRisk >= 3, baseOn = ObsDataID)

try_traits <- try %>%
  distinct(TraitID, .keep_all=TRUE)
# Reading in taxonomic/photosynthetic pathway reference
try_cat <- read_csv("TRY database files/Try2022127155028TRY_Categorical_Traits_Lookup_Table_2012_03_17_TestRelease.csv")
try_cat_grass <- try_cat %>%
  filter(Family == "Poaceae") %>%
  filter(PhotosyntheticPathway != "NA") %>%
  dplyr::select(AccSpeciesID,Family,PhotosyntheticPathway)

# vcmax subset
try_vc <- try %>%
  filter(TraitID == 186) %>%
  dplyr::select(SpeciesName,AccSpeciesID,AccSpeciesName,StdValue,UnitName,ErrorRisk) %>%
  rename(vcmax = StdValue) %>%
  group_by(AccSpeciesID) %>%
  mutate(vcmax = mean(vcmax)) %>%
  mutate(ErrorRisk = mean(ErrorRisk)) %>%
  distinct(AccSpeciesID,AccSpeciesName,vcmax,UnitName,ErrorRisk)
try_vc <- merge(try_vc, try_cat_grass, by="AccSpeciesID")
try_vc <- try_vc %>%
  distinct(AccSpeciesID, .keep_all=TRUE)
try_vc_C3 <- try_vc %>%
  filter(PhotosyntheticPathway == "C3") # 32 species
mean(try_vc_C3$vcmax) # 49.339
# The above roughly translates to a vcmax15 of 32.9
calcSE(try_vc_C3$vcmax) # 5.916
sd(try_vc_C3$vcmax) # 33.465
mean(try_vc_C3$vcmax) - sd(try_vc_C3$vcmax) #15.874
mean(try_vc_C3$vcmax) + sd(try_vc_C3$vcmax) # 82.804
mean(try_vc_C3$vcmax) - (1.96 * calcSE(try_vc_C3$vcmax)) #37.744
# The above roughly translates to a vcmax15 of 26.2
mean(try_vc_C3$vcmax) + (1.96 * calcSE(try_vc_C3$vcmax)) # 60.934
# The above roughly translates to a vcmax15 of 42.3

try_vc_C4 <- try_vc %>%
  filter(PhotosyntheticPathway == "C4") # 7 species
mean(try_vc_C4$vcmax) # 57.96192
calcSE(try_vc_C4$vcmax) # 7.853
sd(try_vc_C4$vcmax) # 20.776
mean(try_vc_C4$vcmax) - sd(try_vc_C4$vcmax) # 34.344
mean(try_vc_C4$vcmax) + sd(try_vc_C4$vcmax) # 74.896
#write_xlsx(try_vc, "try_vc.xlsx")

# SLA subset
try_SLA <- try %>%
  filter(TraitID == 3117) %>%
  dplyr::select(SpeciesName,AccSpeciesID,AccSpeciesName,StdValue,UnitName,ErrorRisk) %>%
  rename(SLA = StdValue) %>%
  filter(SLA != "NA") %>%
  group_by(AccSpeciesID) %>%
  mutate(SLA = mean(SLA)) %>%
  mutate(ErrorRisk = mean(ErrorRisk)) %>%
  distinct(AccSpeciesID,AccSpeciesName,SLA,UnitName,ErrorRisk)
try_SLA <- merge(try_SLA, try_cat_grass, by="AccSpeciesID")
try_SLA <- try_SLA %>%
  distinct(AccSpeciesID, .keep_all=TRUE)
try_SLA_C3 <- try_SLA %>%
  filter(PhotosyntheticPathway == "C3") # 252 species
mean(try_SLA_C3$SLA) # 19.0745
C3_SLA_SD <- sd(try_SLA_C3$SLA) / (0.45) # Old: 17.131, New: 20.93777
C3_SLA_mean <- (mean(try_SLA_C3$SLA))/(0.45) # Old: 34.681 m2 kg-1 C, New: 42.38778
C3_SLA_SE <- (calcSE(try_SLA_C3$SLA))/(0.45) # Old: 1.079, New: 1.318955
C3_SLA_mean - (1.96 * C3_SLA_SE) # Old: 32.566 = CI lower bound, New: 39.803
C3_SLA_mean + (1.96 * C3_SLA_SE) # Old: 36.796 = CI upper bound, New: 44.97293
C3_SLA_mean - (2 * C3_SLA_SD) # Old: 0.419 within two standard deviations, New: 0.51224
C3_SLA_mean + (2 * C3_SLA_SD) # Old: 68.943 within two standard deviations, New: 84.26331
C3_SLA_mean - C3_SLA_SD # Old: 17.55 within one standard deviation, New: 21.45001
C3_SLA_mean + C3_SLA_SD # Old: 51.812 within one standard deviation, New: 63.32554

try_SLA_C4 <- try_SLA %>%
  filter(PhotosyntheticPathway == "C4") # 141 species
mean(try_SLA_C4$SLA) # 17.45488 m2 kg-1 dry matter
C4_SLA_SD <- sd(try_SLA_C4$SLA) / (0.45) # Old: 15.518 (SD), New: 18.96656
C4_SLA_mean <- (mean(try_SLA_C4$SLA))/(0.45) # Old: 31.754 m2 kg-1 C, New: 38.81028
C4_SLA_SE <- (calcSE(try_SLA_C4$SLA))/(0.45) # Old: 1.307, New: 1.597272
C4_SLA_mean - (1.96 * C4_SLA_SE) # Old: 29.192 = CI lower bound, New: 35.67963
C4_SLA_mean + (1.96 * C4_SLA_SE) #Old: 34.315 = CI upper bound, New: 41.94094
C4_SLA_mean - (2 * C4_SLA_SD) #Old: 0.717 within two standard deviations, New: 0.8771701
C4_SLA_mean + (2 * C4_SLA_SD) #Old: 62.79 within two standard deviations, New: 76.7434
C4_SLA_mean - C4_SLA_SD #Old: 16.236 within one standard deviation, New: 19.84373
C4_SLA_mean + C4_SLA_SD #Old: 47.272 within one standard deviation, New: 57.77684

#write_xlsx(try_SLA, "try_SLA_coded.xlsx")

### Re-reading in coded data
try_vc_coded <- read_xlsx("try_vc_coded.xlsx")
try_vc_coded_filt <- try_vc_coded %>%
  filter(Grazable == "Yes") %>% # 40 to 24, C3 from 32 to 19, C4 from 7 to 5
  filter(AnnualPerennial == "Perennial") %>% # 24 to 19, C3 from 19 to 14, C4 stays at 5, accounts for all "crops"
  filter(InUS == "Yes") # 19 to 18, C3 from 14 to 13, C4 stays at 5

try_vc_coded_C3 <- try_vc_coded_filt %>%
  filter(PhotosyntheticPathway == "C3")
mean(try_vc_coded_C3$vcmax15) # 26.81
try_vc_coded_C4 <- try_vc_coded_filt %>%
  filter(PhotosyntheticPathway == "C4")
mean(try_vc_coded_C4$vcmax15) # 32.98
view(try_vc_coded_C4)

try_vc_coded_C3 <- try_vc_coded %>%
  filter(PhotosyntheticPathway == "C3")
mean(try_vc_coded_C3$vcmax15) # 32.653
try_vc_coded_C4 <- try_vc_coded %>%
  filter(PhotosyntheticPathway == "C4")
mean(try_vc_coded_C4$vcmax15) # 36.743

write_xlsx(try_vc_coded_filt, "try_vc_coded_filtered.xlsx")


# Biomass partitioning data
try_part <- rtry_import("TRY database files/27466.txt")
try_part <- rtry_remove_dup(try_part)
try_part <- rtry_exclude(try_part, ErrorRisk >= 3, baseOn = ObsDataID)
try_part <- try_part %>%
  filter(OriglName == "New stem C to new leaf C allocation")
# try_part <- merge(try_part, try_cat_grass, by="AccSpeciesID") # 0 grass species, only grass functional types, have to filter manually
try_part <- try_part %>%
  filter(OriglName == "New stem C to new leaf C allocation") # 0 grass species for that too


### BETYdb data
bety_vc <- betydb_search("Vcmax")
try_cat_grass_bety <- try_cat %>%
  filter(Family == "Poaceae") %>%
  filter(PhotosyntheticPathway != "NA") %>%
  dplyr::select(AccSpeciesName,Family,PhotosyntheticPathway) %>%
  rename(scientificname = AccSpeciesName)


bety_vc_grass <- bety_vc %>%
  group_by(scientificname) %>%
  mutate(n_sum = sum(n)) %>%
  mutate(meanXn = mean*n) %>%
  mutate(mean_sum = sum(meanXn)) %>%
  distinct(scientificname, .keep_all=TRUE) %>%
  mutate(vcmax = mean_sum / n_sum)

bety_SLA <- betydb_search("SLA")
bety_SLA <- merge(bety_SLA, try_cat_grass_bety, by="scientificname")
bety_SLA_grass <- bety_SLA %>%
  group_by(scientificname) %>%
  mutate(n_sum = sum(n)) %>%
  mutate(meanXn = mean*n) %>%
  mutate(mean_sum = sum(meanXn)) %>%
  distinct(scientificname, .keep_all=TRUE) %>%
  mutate(SLA = mean_sum / n_sum)

bety_vc_grass_C3 <- bety_vc_grass %>%
  filter(PhotosyntheticPathway == "C3") # 11 species
mean(bety_vc_grass_C3$vcmax) # 46.07294

bety_vc_grass_C4 <- bety_vc_grass %>%
  filter(PhotosyntheticPathway == "C4") # 1 species (switchgrass)
mean(bety_vc_grass_C4$vcmax) # 16.16571


# Atkinson et al. 2016 data
atk <- read_csv("41477_2016_BFnplants201638_MOESM4_ESM.csv")
C3 <- atk %>%
  filter(photosynthetic_pathway == "C3") #153 species
```

```{r}


data.frame(mix_ung_ARL_cbiol)
mix_ung_ARL <- nc_open("ARL-mix-ung-plai.nc")

mix_ung_ARL_cbiol <- brick('ARL-mix-ung-plai.nc', varname='plai', level=12)

mix_ung_ARL <- nc_open("ARL-mix-ung-plai.nc") # Ungrazed Arlington run
mix_ung_ARL <- ncvar_get(mix_ung_ARL, "plai")
summary(mix_ung_ARL_C3_C4)

doy <- 1:22280
df.11 <- data.frame(doy=doy, plai = mix_ung_ARL[11,], crop = "C4")

df.12 <- data.frame(doy=doy, plai = mix_ung_ARL[12,], crop = "C3")
df <- rbind(df.11, df.12)
df

ggplot(df.g,aes(x=time, y=sflux, color=Scen))+ geom_line(size=1)+
  labs(title='Monthly streamflow at Grafton, IL', x='Date', y='Sflux (m3/s)') +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(1,180,24),
                     labels=c("2000-01-01","2002-01-01","2004-01-01","2006-01-01",
                              "2008-01-01","2010-01-01","2012-01-01","2014-01-01"))

mix_ung_ARL <- nc_open("ARL-mix-ung-biomass.nc") # Ungrazed Arlington run
mix_ung_ARL_C3_C4 <- ncvar_get(ung_ARL, "l3agbiomfrac")

ung_BR <- nc_open() # Ungrazed BR Ranch run
ung_BR_C3_C4 <- ncvar_get(ung_BR, "C3/C4 Ratio")
ung_BR_anpp <- ncvar_get(ung_BR, "agbiom")
#Reading in csv files (validation data)



# Code graveyard
mix_ung_ARL_daily_C3_df <- mix_ung_ARL_daily_C3_C4_sep_df %>%
  filter(PFT == "C3 Grass") %>%
  mutate(agbiomC3 = cbiol + cbios + cbiog) %>%
  dplyr::select(Date, PFT, agbiomC3)
mix_ung_ARL_daily_C4_df <- mix_ung_ARL_daily_C3_C4_sep_df %>%
  filter(PFT == "C4 Grass") %>%
  mutate(agbiomC4 = cbiol + cbios + cbiog) %>%
  dplyr::select(Date, PFT, agbiomC4)
mix_ung_ARL_daily_C3_C4_comb_df <- cbind(mix_ung_ARL_daily_C3_df, mix_ung_ARL_daily_C4_df)
mix_ung_ARL_daily_C3_C4_comb_df <- mix_ung_ARL_daily_C3_C4_comb_df[ -c(4,5)]
mix_ung_ARL_daily_C3_C4_comb_df <- mix_ung_ARL_daily_C3_C4_comb_df %>%
  mutate(agbiom = agbiomC3 + agbiomC4) %>%
  mutate(l3agbiomfrac = agbiomC3 / agbiom)
mix_ung_ARL_daily_C3_C4_comb_df <- mix_ung_ARL_daily_C3_C4_comb_df[ -c(2:4)]
write.csv(mix_ung_ARL_daily_C3_C4_comb_df, "/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/mix_ung_ARL_daily_C3_C4_comb_df.csv", row.names=FALSE)


mix_ung_ARL_yearly_C3_df <- data.frame()
mix_ung_ARL_yearly_both_df <- data.frame()
mix_ung_ARL_yearly_all_df <- rbind(mix_ung_ARL_yearly_C4_df,mix_ung_ARL_yearly_C3_df,mix_ung_ARL_yearly_both_df)
mix_ung_ARL_anpptot_df <- data.frame(year=year,anpptot=mix_ung_ARL_anpptot,npptot = mix_ung_ARL_npptot,)
mix_ung_ARL_npptot_df <- data.frame(year=year, npptot = mix_ung_ARL_npptot)
mix_ung_ARL_npp_C4_df <- data.frame(year=year, C4_npp = mix_ung_ARL_npp[11,])
mix_ung_ARL_npp_C3_df <- data.frame(year=year, C3_npp = mix_ung_ARL_npp[12,])
mix_ung_ARL_yearly_df <- cbind(mix_ung_ARL_anpptot_df, mix_ung_ARL_npptot_df, mix_ung_ARL_npp_C4_df, mix_ung_ARL_npp_C3_df)
mix_ung_ARL_yearly_df <- mix_ung_ARL_yearly_df[ -c(3,5,7)]
write.csv(mix_ung_ARL_yearly_df, "/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/mix_ung_ARL_yearly_df.csv", row.names=FALSE)


                   
mix_ung_ARL_biomass_C3_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C3 Grass",biomass=mix_ung_ARL_biomass[12,])
mix_ung_ARL_biomass_C3_C4_df <- rbind(mix_ung_ARL_biomass_C3_df, mix_ung_ARL_biomass_C4_df)

mix_ung_ARL_biomass_C4_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C4 Grass",biomass=mix_ung_ARL_biomass[11,])
mix_ung_ARL_biomass_C3_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C3 Grass",biomass=mix_ung_ARL_biomass[12,])
mix_ung_ARL_biomass_C3_C4_df <- rbind(mix_ung_ARL_biomass_C3_df, mix_ung_ARL_biomass_C4_df)

mix_ung_ARL_cbiol_C4_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C4 Grass",cbiol=mix_ung_ARL_cbiol[11,])
mix_ung_ARL_cbiol_C3_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C3 Grass",cbiol=mix_ung_ARL_cbiol[12,])
mix_ung_ARL_cbiol_C3_C4_df <- rbind(mix_ung_ARL_cbiol_C3_df, mix_ung_ARL_cbiol_C4_df)

mix_ung_ARL_cbios_C4_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C4 Grass",cbios=mix_ung_ARL_cbios[11,])
mix_ung_ARL_cbios_C3_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C3 Grass",cbios=mix_ung_ARL_cbios[12,])
mix_ung_ARL_cbios_C3_C4_df <- rbind(mix_ung_ARL_cbios_C3_df, mix_ung_ARL_cbios_C4_df)

mix_ung_ARL_cbiog_C4_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C4 Grass",cbiog=mix_ung_ARL_cbiog[11,])
mix_ung_ARL_cbiog_C3_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C3 Grass",cbiog=mix_ung_ARL_cbiog[12,])
mix_ung_ARL_cbiog_C3_C4_df <- rbind(mix_ung_ARL_cbiog_C3_df, mix_ung_ARL_cbiog_C4_df)

mix_ung_ARL_cbior_C4_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C4 Grass",cbior=mix_ung_ARL_cbior[11,])
mix_ung_ARL_cbior_C3_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C3 Grass",cbior=mix_ung_ARL_cbior[12,])
mix_ung_ARL_cbior_C3_C4_df <- rbind(mix_ung_ARL_cbior_C3_df, mix_ung_ARL_cbior_C4_df)

mix_ung_ARL_plai_C4_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C4 Grass",plai=mix_ung_ARL_plai[11,])
mix_ung_ARL_plai_C3_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C3 Grass",plai=mix_ung_ARL_plai[12,])
mix_ung_ARL_plai_C3_C4_df <- rbind(mix_ung_ARL_plai_C3_df, mix_ung_ARL_plai_C4_df)

mix_ung_ARL_daily_C3_C4_df <- cbind(mix_ung_ARL_biomass_C3_C4_df, mix_ung_ARL_cbiol_C3_C4_df, mix_ung_ARL_cbios_C3_C4_df,
                                    mix_ung_ARL_cbiog_C3_C4_df, mix_ung_ARL_cbior_C3_C4_df, mix_ung_ARL_plai_C3_C4_df)
mix_ung_ARL_daily_C3_C4_df <- mix_ung_ARL_daily_C3_C4_df[ -c(4,5,7,8,10,11,13,14,16,17)]
mix_ung_ARL_daily_C3_C4_df_descriptors <- data.frame(day=date,SimulationType="Both grasses allowed",Management="Ungrazed",Location="ARL",
                                                     Lat=43.0318,Lon=-89.3539)
mix_ung_ARL_daily_C3_C4_df <- cbind(mix_ung_ARL_daily_C3_C4_df,mix_ung_ARL_daily_C3_C4_df_descriptors)
mix_ung_ARL_daily_C3_C4_df <- mix_ung_ARL_daily_C3_C4_df[-9]
view(mix_ung_ARL_daily_C3_C4_df)

mix_ung_ARL_agbiom_mix_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="Both Grasses",biomass="NA",cbiol="NA",cbios="NA",cbiog="NA",cbior="NA",plai="NA",
                                       SimulationType="Both grasses allowed",Management="Ungrazed",Location="ARL",Lat=43.0318,Lon=-89.3539,
                                       agbiom=mix_ung_ARL_agbiom,grazedbiom=mix_ung_ARL_grazedbiom,l3agbiomfrac=mix_ung_ARL_l3agbiomfrac)
view(mix_ung_ARL_agbiom_mix_df)
mix_ung_ARL_grazedbiom_mix_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="Both Grasses",SimulationType="Both grasses allowed",Management="Ungrazed",Location="FF",grazedbiom=mix_ung_FF_grazedbiom)
mix_ung_ARL_l3agbiomfrac_mix_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="Both Grasses",SimulationType="Both grasses allowed",Management="Ungrazed",Location="FF",l3agbiomfrac=mix_ung_FF_l3agbiomfrac)


write.csv(mix_ung_ARL_daily_C3_C4_sep_df, "/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/mix_ung_ARL_daily_C3_C4_sep_df.csv", row.names=FALSE)

## Annual
mix_ung_ARL_anpptot_df <- data.frame(year=year, anpptot = mix_ung_ARL_anpptot)
mix_ung_ARL_npptot_df <- data.frame(year=year, npptot = mix_ung_ARL_npptot)
mix_ung_ARL_npp_C4_df <- data.frame(year=year, C4_npp = mix_ung_ARL_npp[11,])
mix_ung_ARL_npp_C3_df <- data.frame(year=year, C3_npp = mix_ung_ARL_npp[12,])
mix_ung_ARL_yearly_df <- cbind(mix_ung_ARL_anpptot_df, mix_ung_ARL_npptot_df, mix_ung_ARL_npp_C4_df, mix_ung_ARL_npp_C3_df)
mix_ung_ARL_yearly_df <- mix_ung_ARL_yearly_df[ -c(3,5,7)]
write.csv(mix_ung_ARL_yearly_df, "/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/mix_ung_ARL_yearly_df.csv", row.names=FALSE)




#### Bison Ridge Ranch
### Daily - Separate C3/C4 and Combined C3/C4
mix_ung_BR_biomass_C4_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C4 Grass",biomass=mix_ung_BR_biomass[11,])
mix_ung_BR_biomass_C3_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C3 Grass",biomass=mix_ung_BR_biomass[12,])
mix_ung_BR_biomass_C3_C4_df <- rbind(mix_ung_BR_biomass_C3_df, mix_ung_BR_biomass_C4_df)

mix_ung_BR_cbiol_C4_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C4 Grass",cbiol=mix_ung_BR_cbiol[11,])
mix_ung_BR_cbiol_C3_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C3 Grass",cbiol=mix_ung_BR_cbiol[12,])
mix_ung_BR_cbiol_C3_C4_df <- rbind(mix_ung_BR_cbiol_C3_df, mix_ung_BR_cbiol_C4_df)

mix_ung_BR_cbios_C4_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C4 Grass",cbios=mix_ung_BR_cbios[11,])
mix_ung_BR_cbios_C3_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C3 Grass",cbios=mix_ung_BR_cbios[12,])
mix_ung_BR_cbios_C3_C4_df <- rbind(mix_ung_BR_cbios_C3_df, mix_ung_BR_cbios_C4_df)

mix_ung_BR_cbiog_C4_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C4 Grass",cbiog=mix_ung_BR_cbiog[11,])
mix_ung_BR_cbiog_C3_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C3 Grass",cbiog=mix_ung_BR_cbiog[12,])
mix_ung_BR_cbiog_C3_C4_df <- rbind(mix_ung_BR_cbiog_C3_df, mix_ung_BR_cbiog_C4_df)

mix_ung_BR_cbior_C4_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C4 Grass",cbior=mix_ung_BR_cbior[11,])
mix_ung_BR_cbior_C3_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C3 Grass",cbior=mix_ung_BR_cbior[12,])
mix_ung_BR_cbior_C3_C4_df <- rbind(mix_ung_BR_cbior_C3_df, mix_ung_BR_cbior_C4_df)

mix_ung_BR_plai_C4_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C4 Grass",plai=mix_ung_BR_plai[11,])
mix_ung_BR_plai_C3_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C3 Grass",plai=mix_ung_BR_plai[12,])
mix_ung_BR_plai_C3_C4_df <- rbind(mix_ung_BR_plai_C3_df, mix_ung_BR_plai_C4_df)

mix_ung_BR_daily_C3_C4_sep_df <- cbind(mix_ung_BR_biomass_C3_C4_df, mix_ung_BR_cbiol_C3_C4_df, mix_ung_BR_cbios_C3_C4_df,
                                    mix_ung_BR_cbiog_C3_C4_df, mix_ung_BR_cbior_C3_C4_df, mix_ung_BR_plai_C3_C4_df)
mix_ung_BR_daily_C3_C4_sep_df <- mix_ung_BR_daily_C3_C4_sep_df[ -c(4,5,7,8,10,11,13,14,16,17)]
write.csv(mix_ung_BR_daily_C3_C4_sep_df, "/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/mix_ung_BR_daily_C3_C4_sep_df.csv", row.names=FALSE)



### Annual
mix_ung_BR_anpptot_df <- data.frame(year=year, anpptot = mix_ung_BR_anpptot)
mix_ung_BR_npptot_df <- data.frame(year=year, npptot = mix_ung_BR_npptot)
mix_ung_BR_npp_C4_df <- data.frame(year=year, C4_npp = mix_ung_BR_npp[11,])
mix_ung_BR_npp_C3_df <- data.frame(year=year, C3_npp = mix_ung_BR_npp[12,])
mix_ung_BR_yearly_df <- cbind(mix_ung_BR_anpptot_df, mix_ung_BR_npptot_df, mix_ung_BR_npp_C4_df, mix_ung_BR_npp_C3_df)
mix_ung_BR_yearly_df <- mix_ung_BR_yearly_df[ -c(3,5,7)]
write.csv(mix_ung_BR_yearly_df, "/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/mix_ung_BR_yearly_df.csv", row.names=FALSE)



#### Franbrook Farm
### Daily - Separate C3/C4 and Combined C3/C4
mix_ung_FF_biomass_C4_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C4 Grass",biomass=mix_ung_FF_biomass[11,])
mix_ung_FF_biomass_C3_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C3 Grass",biomass=mix_ung_FF_biomass[12,])
mix_ung_FF_biomass_C3_C4_df <- rbind(mix_ung_FF_biomass_C3_df, mix_ung_FF_biomass_C4_df)

mix_ung_FF_cbiol_C4_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C4 Grass",cbiol=mix_ung_FF_cbiol[11,])
mix_ung_FF_cbiol_C3_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C3 Grass",cbiol=mix_ung_FF_cbiol[12,])
mix_ung_FF_cbiol_C3_C4_df <- rbind(mix_ung_FF_cbiol_C3_df, mix_ung_FF_cbiol_C4_df)

mix_ung_FF_cbios_C4_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C4 Grass",cbios=mix_ung_FF_cbios[11,])
mix_ung_FF_cbios_C3_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C3 Grass",cbios=mix_ung_FF_cbios[12,])
mix_ung_FF_cbios_C3_C4_df <- rbind(mix_ung_FF_cbios_C3_df, mix_ung_FF_cbios_C4_df)

mix_ung_FF_cbiog_C4_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C4 Grass",cbiog=mix_ung_FF_cbiog[11,])
mix_ung_FF_cbiog_C3_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C3 Grass",cbiog=mix_ung_FF_cbiog[12,])
mix_ung_FF_cbiog_C3_C4_df <- rbind(mix_ung_FF_cbiog_C3_df, mix_ung_FF_cbiog_C4_df)

mix_ung_FF_cbior_C4_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C4 Grass",cbior=mix_ung_FF_cbior[11,])
mix_ung_FF_cbior_C3_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C3 Grass",cbior=mix_ung_FF_cbior[12,])
mix_ung_FF_cbior_C3_C4_df <- rbind(mix_ung_FF_cbior_C3_df, mix_ung_FF_cbior_C4_df)

mix_ung_FF_plai_C4_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C4 Grass",plai=mix_ung_FF_plai[11,])
mix_ung_FF_plai_C3_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="C3 Grass",plai=mix_ung_FF_plai[12,])
mix_ung_FF_plai_C3_C4_df <- rbind(mix_ung_FF_plai_C3_df, mix_ung_FF_plai_C4_df)

mix_ung_FF_agbiom_mix_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="Both Grasses",SimulationType="Both grasses allowed",Management="Ungrazed",Location="FF",agbiom=mix_ung_FF_agbiom)
mix_ung_FF_grazedbiom_mix_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="Both Grasses",SimulationType="Both grasses allowed",Management="Ungrazed",Location="FF",grazedbiom=mix_ung_FF_grazedbiom)
mix_ung_FF_l3agbiomfrac_mix_df <- data.frame(day=date,PFT="Both Grasses",SimulationType="Both grasses allowed",Management="Ungrazed",Location="FF",l3agbiomfrac=mix_ung_FF_l3agbiomfrac)



mix_ung_FF_daily_C3_C4_sep_df <- cbind(mix_ung_FF_biomass_C3_C4_df, mix_ung_FF_cbiol_C3_C4_df, mix_ung_FF_cbios_C3_C4_df,
                                    mix_ung_FF_cbiog_C3_C4_df, mix_ung_FF_cbior_C3_C4_df, mix_ung_FF_plai_C3_C4_df)
#mix_ung_FF_daily_C3_C4_sep_df <- mix_ung_FF_daily_C3_C4_sep_df[ -c(4,5,7,8,10,11,13,14,16,17)]
```
