```{r}
write.csv(mix_ung_FF_daily_C3_C4_sep_df, "/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/mix_ung_FF_daily_C3_C4_sep_df.csv", row.names=FALSE)


write.csv(mix_ung_FF_daily_C3_C4_comb_df, "/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/mix_ung_FF_daily_C3_C4_comb_df.csv", row.names=FALSE)

### Annual
mix_ung_FF_anpptot_df <- data.frame(year=year, anpptot = mix_ung_FF_anpptot)
mix_ung_FF_npptot_df <- data.frame(year=year, npptot = mix_ung_FF_npptot)
mix_ung_FF_npp_C4_df <- data.frame(year=year, C4_npp = mix_ung_FF_npp[11,])
mix_ung_FF_npp_C3_df <- data.frame(year=year, C3_npp = mix_ung_FF_npp[12,])
mix_ung_FF_yearly_df <- cbind(mix_ung_FF_anpptot_df, mix_ung_FF_npptot_df, mix_ung_FF_npp_C4_df, mix_ung_FF_npp_C3_df)
mix_ung_FF_yearly_df <- mix_ung_FF_yearly_df[ -c(3,5,7)]
write.csv(mix_ung_FF_yearly_df, "/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/mix_ung_FF_yearly_df.csv", row.names=FALSE)

```


```{r}
######### Old code vs new code dataset creation and graph

setwd("/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis")

##### Reading in day and year dataframes
date <- read_csv("Date_daily.csv") # This includes every day from 1/1/1961 to 12/31/2021
year <- read_csv("Year.csv") # This includes every year from 1961 to 2021

### Old runs
old_FF_biom_readin <- nc_open("old-FF-mix-ung-biomass.nc")
old_FF_cbiol <- ncvar_get(old_FF_biom_readin, "cbiol")
old_FF_cbios <- ncvar_get(old_FF_biom_readin, "cbios")
old_FF_cbiog <- ncvar_get(old_FF_biom_readin, "cbiog")
old_FF_cbior <- ncvar_get(old_FF_biom_readin, "cbior")
old_FF_biomass <- ncvar_get(old_FF_biom_readin, "biomass")
old_FF_plai_readin <- nc_open("FF-spinup-plai.nc")
old_FF_plai <- ncvar_get(spinup_FF_plai_readin, "plai")
spinup_FF_aet_d_readin <- nc_open("FF-spinup-aet-d.nc")
spinup_FF_aet_d <- ncvar_get(spinup_FF_aet_d_readin, "aet")
spinup_FF_wsoi_d_readin <- nc_open("FF-spinup-wsoi-d.nc")
spinup_FF_wsoi_d <- ncvar_get(spinup_FF_wsoi_d_readin, "wsoi")
# No PFT
spinup_FF_pasture_readin <- nc_open("FF-spinup-pasture.nc")
spinup_FF_agbiom <- ncvar_get(spinup_FF_pasture_readin, "agbiom")
spinup_FF_panpp <- ncvar_get(spinup_FF_pasture_readin, "panpp")
spinup_FF_pbnpp <- ncvar_get(spinup_FF_pasture_readin, "pbnpp")
spinup_FF_grazedbiom <- ncvar_get(spinup_FF_pasture_readin, "grazedbiom")
spinup_FF_l3agbiomfrac <- ncvar_get(spinup_FF_pasture_readin, "l3agbiomfrac")
# Annual
spinup_FF_npp_readin <- nc_open("FF-spinup-npp.nc")
spinup_FF_anpptot <- ncvar_get(spinup_FF_npp_readin, "anpptot")
spinup_FF_npptot <- ncvar_get(spinup_FF_npp_readin, "npptot")
spinup_FF_npp <- ncvar_get(spinup_FF_npp_readin, "npp")
spinup_FF_gsdays <- ncvar_get(spinup_FF_npp_readin, "gsdays")
spinup_FF_aet_y_readin <- nc_open("FF-spinup-aet-y.nc")
spinup_FF_aet_y <- ncvar_get(spinup_FF_aet_y_readin, "aet")
spinup_FF_wsoi_y_readin <- nc_open("FF-spinup-wsoi-y.nc")
spinup_FF_wsoi_y <- ncvar_get(spinup_FF_wsoi_y_readin, "wsoi")
spinup_FF_vegtype0_readin <- nc_open("FF-spinup-vegtype0.nc")
spinup_FF_vegtype0 <- ncvar_get(spinup_FF_vegtype0_readin, "vegtype0")
spinup_FF_csoi_readin <- nc_open("FF-spinup-csoi.nc")
spinup_FF_totcsoi <- ncvar_get(spinup_FF_csoi_readin, "totcsoi")

```



```{r}
# Thesis code graveyard

### LAI graphs
#FF_val_recoded_recombined$date <- as.Date(FF_val_recoded_recombined$date)
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/Obs_LAI_FF.tiff", units="in", height=5, width=9, res=300)
ggplot(FF_val_recoded_recombined, aes(x=date, y=mean_lai)) + geom_line(aes(col=treatment)) + 
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=mean_lai-SE_lai, ymax=mean_lai+SE_lai), width=.2) +
  ylab("Mean Leaf Area Index (m2 m-2)") + xlab("Date") + theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=90, vjust=0.5)) +
  ggtitle("Observed Mean LAI at Franbrook Farm from 2006-2007") + labs(col="Management") +
  scale_x_date(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(8))

# agbiom graph
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/Obs_agbiom_FF.tiff", units="in", height=5, width=9, res=300)
ggplot(FF_val_recoded_recombined, aes(x=date, y=mean_agbiom)) + geom_line(aes(col=treatment)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=mean_agbiom-SE_agbiom, ymax=mean_agbiom+SE_agbiom), width=.2) +
  ylab("Aboveground Biomass (kg m-2)") + xlab("Date") + theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=90, vjust=0.5)) +
  ggtitle("Observed Aboveground Biomass at Franbrook Farm from 2006-2007") +
  labs(col="Management") + scale_x_date(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(8)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0.0, 0.7)) + scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(6))
# LAI graph
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/Sim_LAI_FF.tiff", units="in", height=5, width=9, res=300)
ggplot(data=FF_daily_C3,aes(x=Date,y=plai)) + geom_line(aes(col=Management)) +
  ggtitle("Simulated LAI at Franbrook Farm from 2006-2007") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=90, vjust=0.5)) +
  ylab("Daily Leaf Area Index (m2 m-2)") + xlab("Date") + scale_x_date(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(8))


# Graph of aboveground biomass for C3
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/Sim_agbiom_FF.tiff", units="in", height=5, width=9, res=300)
ggplot(data=FF_daily_C3,aes(x=Date,y=agbiom)) + geom_line(aes(col=Management)) +
  ggtitle("Simulated Aboveground Biomass at Franbrook Farm from 2006-2007") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=90, vjust=0.5)) + ylim(0,0.7) +
  ylab("Aboveground Biomass (kg m-2)") + xlab("Date") + scale_x_date(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(8)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(6))

# LAI point graph
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/Gen_vs_Oates_vs_Obs_LAI_point_FF.tiff", units="in", height=5, width=9, res=300)
ggplot() + geom_point(data=FF_val_recoded_recombined_renamed_rot2, aes(x=Date, y=plai, col="blue")) +
  geom_line(data=FF_daily_C3_rot2, aes(x=Date, y=plai, col="green")) +
  geom_line(data=FF_daily_C3_rot2_oates, aes(x=Date, y=plai, col="red")) +
  ggtitle("Generalized vs. Date-Aligned 2-Day Rotation Simulation at Franbrook Farm") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=90, vjust=0.5)) +
  ylab("Daily Leaf Area Index (m2 m-2)") + xlab("Date") + scale_x_date(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(8)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(6)) +
  scale_color_discrete(name="Data Source", labels=c("Evaluation Data","Generalized Model","Date-Aligned Model"))
# agbiom point graph
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/Gen_vs_Oates_vs_Obs_agbiom_point_FF.tiff", units="in", height=5, width=9, res=300)
ggplot() + geom_point(data=FF_val_recoded_recombined_renamed_rot2, aes(x=Date, y=agbiom, col="blue")) +
  geom_line(data=FF_daily_C3_rot2, aes(x=Date, y=agbiom, col="green")) +
  geom_line(data=FF_daily_C3_rot2_oates, aes(x=Date, y=agbiom, col="red")) +
  ggtitle("Aboveground Biomass for Generalized vs. Date-Aligned 2-Day Rotation Simulation at Franbrook Farm") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=90, vjust=0.5)) +
  ylab("Daily Leaf Area Index (m2 m-2)") + xlab("Date") + scale_x_date(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(8)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(6)) +
  scale_color_discrete(name="Data Source", labels=c("Evaluation Data","Generalized Model","Date-Aligned Model"))

# Line graph vs. point data
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/Sim_vs_Obs_LAI_point_FF.tiff", units="in", height=5, width=9, res=300)
ggplot() + geom_point(data=FF_val_recoded_recombined_renamed, aes(x=Date, y=plai, col=Management)) +
  geom_line(data=FF_daily_C3, aes(x=Date, y=plai, col=Management)) +
  ggtitle("Simulated vs. Observed LAI at FF") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=90, vjust=0.5)) +
  ylab("Daily Leaf Area Index (m2 m-2)") + xlab("Date") + scale_x_date(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(8)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(6))

# Line graph vs. point data
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/Sim_vs_Obs_agbiom_FF.tiff", units="in", height=5, width=9, res=300)
agbiom_simvsobs_graph <- ggplot() + geom_point(data=FF_val_recoded_recombined_renamed, aes(x=Date, y=agbiom, col=Management)) +
  geom_line(data=FF_daily_C3, aes(x=Date, y=agbiom, col=Management)) +
  ggtitle("Simulated vs. Observed Aboveground Biomass at Franbrook Farm") +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=90, vjust=0.5)) +
  ylab("Aboveground Biomass (kg m-2)") + xlab("Date") + scale_x_date(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(8)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(5))

# Graph of C3 ratio over time for grazing at FF
FF_daily_both <- FF_daily %>%
  filter(Date >= '1979-01-01') %>%
  filter(Location == "FF") %>%
  filter(PFT == "Both Grasses") %>%
  filter(l3agbiomfrac != "NaN")
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/C3_Ratio_Graph_Grazing.tiff", units="in", height=6, width=10, res=300)
ggplot(data=FF_daily_both, aes(x=Date,y=l3agbiomfrac)) + geom_line(aes(col=Management)) +
  ggtitle("Simulated Ratio of C3 ANPP to Total ANPP across Grass Management at Franbrook Farm") +
  ylab("Ratio of C3 ANPP to Total NPP") + xlab("Year") + theme(plot.title=element_text(size=15),
  axis.text=element_text(size=10),axis.title=element_text(size=12)) + facet_wrap(~Management) +
  theme(legend.position="none")

# ANPPtot and NPPtot combined graph
tiff(file="/Users/huntermackin/Dropbox/Mac/Downloads/Research/Agro-IBIS/Grassland Projects/MS Thesis/Thesis Runs and Data Vis and Analysis/anpp_npp_y.tiff", units="in", height=5, width=11, res=300)
ggarrange(anpp_y, npp_y, common.legend = TRUE, legend="bottom", labels=c("A","B"))


### Regressions
npptot_reg <- lm(data=FF_yearly_NPP, npptot ~ aet + CO2 + netrad + Management)
summary(npptot_reg)

anpptot_reg <- lm(data=FF_yearly_NPP, anpptot ~ aet + CO2 + netrad + Management)
summary(anpptot_reg)

# Creating difference datasets
anpp_rot2_ung <- FF_yearly_NPP_rot2$anpptot - FF_yearly_NPP_ung$anpptot
anpp_cont_ung <- FF_yearly_NPP_cont$anpptot - FF_yearly_NPP_ung$anpptot
anpp_rot2_cont <- FF_yearly_NPP_rot2$anpptot - FF_yearly_NPP_cont$anpptot

npp_rot2_ung <- FF_yearly_NPP_rot2$npptot - FF_yearly_NPP_ung$npptot
npp_cont_ung <- FF_yearly_NPP_cont$npptot - FF_yearly_NPP_ung$npptot
npp_rot2_cont <- FF_yearly_NPP_rot2$npptot - FF_yearly_NPP_cont$npptot

aet_rot2_ung <- FF_yearly_NPP_rot2$aet_y - FF_yearly_NPP_ung$aet_y
aet_cont_ung <- FF_yearly_NPP_cont$aet_y - FF_yearly_NPP_ung$aet_y
aet_rot2_cont <- FF_yearly_NPP_rot2$aet_y - FF_yearly_NPP_cont$aet_y

wsoi_rot2_ung <- FF_yearly_NPP_rot2$wsoi_y - FF_yearly_NPP_ung$wsoi_y
wsoi_cont_ung <- FF_yearly_NPP_cont$wsoi_y - FF_yearly_NPP_ung$wsoi_y
wsoi_rot2_cont <- FF_yearly_NPP_rot2$wsoi_y - FF_yearly_NPP_cont$wsoi_y

FF_yearly_NPP_diff<- cbind(FF_yearly_NPP_ung, anpp_rot2_ung, anpp_cont_ung, anpp_rot2_cont,
                           npp_rot2_ung, npp_cont_ung, npp_rot2_cont,
                           aet_rot2_ung, aet_cont_ung, aet_rot2_cont,
                           wsoi_rot2_ung, wsoi_cont_ung, wsoi_rot2_cont)

reg_anpp_rot2_ung <- lm(data=FF_yearly_NPP_diff, anpp_rot2_ung ~ aet_rot2_ung + wsoi_rot2_ung)
summary(reg_anpp_rot2_ung)
reg_anpp_cont_ung <- lm(data=FF_yearly_NPP_diff, anpp_cont_ung ~ aet_cont_ung + wsoi_cont_ung)
summary(reg_anpp_cont_ung)
reg_anpp_rot2_cont <- lm(data=FF_yearly_NPP_diff, anpp_rot2_cont ~ aet_rot2_cont + wsoi_rot2_cont)
summary(reg_anpp_rot2_cont)

reg_npp_rot2_ung <- lm(data=FF_yearly_NPP_diff, npp_rot2_ung ~ aet_rot2_ung + wsoi_rot2_ung)
summary(reg_npp_rot2_ung)
reg_npp_cont_ung <- lm(data=FF_yearly_NPP_diff, npp_cont_ung ~ aet_cont_ung + wsoi_cont_ung)
summary(reg_npp_cont_ung)
reg_npp_rot2_cont <- lm(data=FF_yearly_NPP_diff, npp_rot2_cont ~ aet_rot2_cont + wsoi_rot2_cont)
summary(reg_npp_rot2_cont)

reg_ET_anpp_rot2_ung <- lm(data=FF_yearly_NPP_diff, aet_rot2_ung ~ anpp_rot2_ung)
summary(reg_ET_anpp_rot2_ung)
reg_ET_anpp_cont_ung <- lm(data=FF_yearly_NPP_diff, aet_cont_ung ~ anpp_cont_ung)
summary(reg_ET_anpp_cont_ung)
reg_ET_anpp_rot2_cont <- lm(data=FF_yearly_NPP_diff, aet_rot2_cont ~ anpp_rot2_cont)
summary(reg_ET_anpp_rot2_cont)

reg_ET_npp_rot2_ung <- lm(data=FF_yearly_NPP_diff, aet_rot2_ung ~ npp_rot2_ung)
summary(reg_ET_npp_rot2_ung)
reg_ET_npp_cont_ung <- lm(data=FF_yearly_NPP_diff, aet_cont_ung ~ npp_cont_ung)
summary(reg_ET_npp_cont_ung)
reg_ET_npp_rot2_cont <- lm(data=FF_yearly_NPP_diff, aet_rot2_cont ~ npp_rot2_cont)
summary(reg_ET_npp_rot2_cont)

t.test(data=FF_yearly_NPP, npp_rot2_ung, npp_cont_ung)

view(FF_yearly_NPP)

```
